hero.title: AI 医疗产业化拐点：从 207 款获批到临床协作者的深水区
hero.title_en: The Inflection Point of AI Healthcare: From 207 Approvals to the Deep Water of Clinical Collaboration
hero.source: 国家药监局 / 华为盘古医疗 3.0 发布会 / 英矽智能 / 每日经济新闻 / 界面新闻 / 财经杂志
hero.source_en: NMPA / Huawei Pangu Medical 3.0 Launch / Insilico Medicine / NBD / Jiemian / Caijing
hero.summary: 截至 2026 年 6 月，国家药监局累计批准 AI 医疗器械 207 款，覆盖影像诊断、心电、眼底、病理、药物筛选五大主赛道；6 月 30 日华为发布盘古医疗 3.0、7 月 2 日英矽智能宣布与武田制药签下 6 亿美元里程碑合作——三个信号同时落在同一周，标志着 AI 医疗从「审批红利期」进入「临床协作深水区」。本文从产业化拐点、审批数据、支付端、临床协作模式、大模型医疗底座、创新药 AI、伦理边界、下一个 12 个月观察窗口 8 个角度拆解。
hero.summary_en: As of June 2026, China's NMPA has approved 207 AI medical devices covering imaging, ECG, ophthalmology, pathology, and drug discovery. Combined with Huawei's Pangu Medical 3.0 launch on June 30 and Insilico Medicine's $600M milestone deal with Takeda on July 2, three signals converge in a single week — marking AI healthcare's transition from an approval-driven phase to a deep-water phase of clinical collaboration. This piece analyzes the inflection point across eight angles.

articles.title: 孙天祥加盟百度：MOSS 主开发者出任基础模型研发部负责人
articles.title_en: Sun Tianxiang Joins Baidu: MOSS Lead Developer Takes Charge of Baidu's Foundation Model R&D Unit
articles.summary: 7 月 1 日《每日经济新闻》《晚点 LatePost》首发，复旦 MOSS 主开发者、Analemma 联合创始人孙天祥正式加盟百度，出任基础模型研发部（BMU）负责人并进入模型委员会（BMC），接替 2025 年 11 月上任的吴甜。孙天祥 1997 年出生，2024 年从复旦大学计算机学院博士毕业，师从邱锡鹏、黄萱菁，2023 年主导开源国内首个类 ChatGPT 对话大模型 MOSS。此番加盟发生在百度 2025 年 11 月拆分技术中台群组 TPG、2026 年 1 月发布文心 5.0（2.4 万亿参数原生全模态）、2026 年 5 月设立 BMC 之后，被业内解读为文心大模型「青年学者-工程主管」路线的关键补位。
articles.summary_en: On July 1, NBD and LatePost broke the news that Sun Tianxiang, lead developer of Fudan's MOSS and co-founder of Analemma, has joined Baidu as head of its Foundation Model Unit (BMU) and a member of the Baidu Model Committee (BMC), succeeding Wu Tian who took the role in November 2025. Born in 1997, Sun earned his PhD from Fudan in 2024 under Xipeng Qiu and Xuanjing Huang. In 2023 he led the release of MOSS, China's first ChatGPT-style open-source dialogue LLM. His hiring follows Baidu's TPG restructuring in November 2025, the launch of Wenxin 5.0 (2.4T native multimodal) in January 2026, and the founding of BMC in May 2026 — a decisive «young scholar × engineering lead» line-up move.
articles.source: 每日经济新闻 / 晚点 LatePost / 科创板日报 / 36 氪 / 新黄河
articles.source_en: NBD / LatePost / STCN / 36Kr / New Yellow River
articles.content: 孙天祥本科毕业于西电，2019 年进入复旦大学计算机学院攻读博士，代表工作包括 Sparse Sharing（AAAI 2020）、CoLAKE（COLING 2020，被百度 ERNIE 3.0 采用）、BBTv2（EMNLP 2022）、Data Mixing Laws（ICLR 2025），Google Scholar 引用超 4200。2023 年 2 月 20 日，他作为主开发者主导发布 MOSS——160 亿参数、国内首个类 ChatGPT 开源对话大模型，8 人学生团队完成完整工程链路。博士毕业后他与团队联合创立 Analemma（日行迹智能），2025 年 3 月获红杉中国、高榕资本、美团龙珠数千万美元天使投资，2026 年 2 月 12 日发布 FARS 全自动科研系统。这次加盟意味着他从「学术+初创」双轨切换到「产业底座」轨道，直接负责百度基础模型的研发。百度 CTO 王海峰对外表示，BMU 负责基础模型研发、AMU（由贾磊负责）负责应用模型研发，两支力量共同支撑文心系列的下一代迭代。
articles.content_en: Sun earned his undergraduate degree at Xidian University and joined Fudan's Computer Science PhD program in 2019, advised by Xipeng Qiu and Xuanjing Huang. His representative works include Sparse Sharing (AAAI 2020), CoLAKE (COLING 2020, later adopted by Baidu ERNIE 3.0), BBTv2 (EMNLP 2022), and Data Mixing Laws (ICLR 2025), with over 4,200 Google Scholar citations. On February 20, 2023, as the lead developer, he shipped MOSS — a 16-billion-parameter open-source ChatGPT-style dialogue LLM, the first of its kind in China, delivered by an 8-student team. Post-PhD, he co-founded Analemma, which raised tens of millions in seed from Sequoia China, GGV, and Meituan Longzhu in March 2025 and launched the FARS autonomous research system on February 12, 2026. Joining Baidu marks his pivot from «academia + startup» dual tracks to «industrial foundation model» work. Baidu CTO Wang Haifeng noted that BMU owns base model R&D while AMU (led by Jia Lei) owns application models — together underpinning the next iterations of the Wenxin series.
key_points: 孙天祥 1997 年出生，复旦计算机博士（2019-2024），师从邱锡鹏、黄萱菁
MOSS 主开发者：160 亿参数、2023-02-20 发布、国内首个类 ChatGPT 开源对话大模型
加盟时间 2026-07-01，出任百度基础模型研发部（BMU）负责人 + 模型委员会（BMC）成员
接替 2025-11 上任的吴甜；AMU 由贾磊负责；CTO 王海峰整体统筹
背景：百度 2026-01-22 发布文心 5.0（2.4 万亿参数原生全模态），2026-05 设立 BMC
key_points_en: Sun Tianxiang, born 1997, PhD in CS from Fudan (2019-2024), advised by Xipeng Qiu and Xuanjing Huang
Lead developer of MOSS: 16B parameters, released Feb 20 2023, China's first ChatGPT-style open-source dialogue LLM
Joined Baidu on July 1 2026 as head of the Foundation Model Unit (BMU) and BMC member
Succeeds Wu Tian (appointed November 2025); AMU is led by Jia Lei, CTO Wang Haifeng oversees both
Context: Baidu launched Wenxin 5.0 (2.4T native multimodal) on Jan 22 2026 and established BMC in May 2026

articles.title: 英伟达 Vera Rubin 提前量产、AI 计算合伙人计划落地：把算力交付按季度切片
articles.title_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Enters Early Mass Production; AI Computing Partner Program Slices Delivery by Quarter
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日多家媒体报道，英伟达下一代 Vera Rubin 平台（GB300/RTX Blackwell Next 系列）提前量产，同期公布「AI 计算合伙人（AI Compute Partner）」计划——把新一代加速卡的季度出货按超算/云厂/主权 AI 三大阵营切片。金刚石散热工艺进入量产，单卡热设计功耗上限从 1200W 提升到 1400W；配合光互联 NVLink 5.5，机架级算力密度较 Blackwell 提升约 65%。华尔街日报同日报道，英伟达 2026 财年数据中心营收指引再度上修，市场预期 GB300 系列 Q4 单季度出货有望达 380 万片。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, multiple outlets reported NVIDIA has brought its next-gen Vera Rubin platform (GB300/RTX Blackwell Next series) into early mass production and unveiled the «AI Compute Partner» program, which slices delivery of new accelerators by quarter across supercomputing labs, hyperscalers, and sovereign AI. Diamond thermal spreading enters mass production, lifting per-card TDP from 1200W to 1400W; combined with NVLink 5.5 optical interconnect, rack-level compute density is up ~65% vs. Blackwell. The WSJ reported the same day that NVIDIA revised up its FY2026 data center guidance, with the market expecting Q4 GB300 shipments to hit 3.8M units.
articles.source: 路透 / 华尔街日报 / DIGITIMES / 每日经济新闻
articles.content: Vera Rubin 提前量产的直接影响是算力交付周期缩短。此前 Blackwell 平台从流片到规模出货用了 14 个月，Vera Rubin 目标压到 8-10 个月。金刚石散热工艺此前只在实验室验证，本次英伟达联合日本电产、超微、鸿海把量产良率推到 87%，让 1400W 单卡功耗下依然能维持稳定运转。「AI 计算合伙人」计划则把出货管理从「按客户签单」升级为「按季度调度」——每个季度出货中，30% 面向 OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI 等模型公司、35% 面向 AWS/Azure/GCP 云厂、35% 面向英国 AI 增长实验室、法国 Mistral、日本 Sakana AI、沙特 HUMAIN 等主权 AI 项目。这套调度机制让 GPU 从「谁付钱谁拿货」变成「按国家/生态位分配」。
articles.content_en: The early mass production of Vera Rubin shortens compute delivery cycles. Blackwell took 14 months from tape-out to volume shipment; Vera Rubin targets 8-10. Diamond thermal spreading — previously lab-only — has been pushed to 87% mass-production yield through partnerships with Nidec, Supermicro, and Foxconn, sustaining stable operation at 1400W TDP. The AI Compute Partner Program upgrades shipment management from «first come first served» to «quarterly allocation»: each quarter, 30% of new accelerators go to model companies (OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI), 35% to hyperscalers (AWS/Azure/GCP), and 35% to sovereign AI programs (UK AI Growth Lab, Mistral in France, Sakana AI in Japan, HUMAIN in Saudi Arabia). GPUs shift from «pay-to-buy» to «allocated-by-ecosystem».
key_points: Vera Rubin 平台（GB300/RTX Blackwell Next）提前量产，从流片到量产压至 8-10 个月
金刚石散热工艺量产良率 87%，单卡 TDP 上限 1200W → 1400W
「AI 计算合伙人」计划：30% 模型公司 / 35% 云厂 / 35% 主权 AI
机架级算力密度较 Blackwell 提升约 65%
2026 Q4 GB300 单季度出货预期 380 万片
key_points_en: Vera Rubin platform (GB300/RTX Blackwell Next) enters early mass production, tape-out-to-volume in 8-10 months
Diamond thermal spreading yield hits 87%; per-card TDP raised from 1200W to 1400W
AI Compute Partner Program: 30% model companies / 35% hyperscalers / 35% sovereign AI
Rack-level compute density up ~65% vs. Blackwell
Q4 2026 GB300 shipments projected at 3.8M units

articles.title: Anthropic 洽谈三星电子代工：AI 芯片供应链再添「第二条腿」
articles.title_en: Anthropic in Talks with Samsung Foundry: A «Second Leg» Emerges in AI Chip Supply Chain
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日《韩国先驱报》与彭博援引产业界人士消息：Anthropic 正在与三星电子代工事业部（Samsung Foundry）洽谈将其自研 AI 推理加速卡后段封装与部分先进制程订单交给三星，目标 2027 年下半年批量出货。此前 Anthropic 的推理加速方案主要依靠 AWS Trainium、Google TPU 与英伟达 Blackwell 组合；此次洽谈标志着 Anthropic 也开始搭建「自研 ASIC + 台积电/三星双供」的独立算力路径，与 OpenAI 与博通合作的 Jalapeño 芯片路线呼应。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, the Korea Herald and Bloomberg cited industry sources reporting Anthropic is in talks with Samsung Foundry to place back-end packaging and some advanced-node orders for its in-house AI inference accelerator, targeting volume shipment in H2 2027. Anthropic's inference stack has relied primarily on AWS Trainium, Google TPU, and NVIDIA Blackwell; the Samsung talks signal Anthropic is building its own «in-house ASIC + TSMC/Samsung dual-source» compute path, mirroring OpenAI's Jalapeño chip line with Broadcom.
articles.source: 韩国先驱报 / 彭博 / DIGITIMES
articles.content: 过去 12 个月大模型公司普遍出现「自研 ASIC」路线：OpenAI 与博通合作的 Jalapeño 已在 2026 年 Q2 完成流片、计划 2027 年批量部署；Google TPU v7 与 Meta MTIA v3 也在同期迭代。Anthropic 之前主要通过 AWS Trainium 与 Google TPU 双供满足推理需求，但公司 CFO Krishna Rao 曾在 5 月的公开投资者会上明确「计划投入自有推理硬件」。三星此次进入 Anthropic 的供应链，一方面是三星代工 2 纳米工艺良率追赶台积电的重要窗口，另一方面也让 Anthropic 在台积电产能被英伟达/苹果/AMD 瓜分的格局下多一条备份。
articles.content_en: Over the past 12 months, major LLM companies have converged on «in-house ASIC» strategies: OpenAI's Jalapeño (with Broadcom) taped out in Q2 2026 and targets volume in 2027; Google TPU v7 and Meta MTIA v3 iterate on similar timelines. Anthropic previously satisfied inference demand via AWS Trainium and Google TPU dual-sourcing, but CFO Krishna Rao explicitly stated in a May investor call that «we plan to invest in our own inference hardware.» Samsung's entry into Anthropic's supply chain is a critical window for Samsung Foundry's 2nm yield catch-up with TSMC, while giving Anthropic a backup path amid TSMC capacity being split among NVIDIA, Apple, and AMD.
key_points: Anthropic 与三星电子代工洽谈自研 AI 推理 ASIC 的后段封装与部分先进制程订单
目标 2027 年下半年批量出货，制程指向三星 2nm
与 OpenAI Jalapeño、Google TPU、Meta MTIA 共同构成大模型公司自研 ASIC 阵营
三星代工在 2nm 良率上追赶台积电的关键窗口
此前 Anthropic 依赖 AWS Trainium + Google TPU + NVIDIA Blackwell 组合
key_points_en: Anthropic in talks with Samsung Foundry for back-end packaging and some advanced-node orders for its in-house inference ASIC
Target volume shipment H2 2027 on Samsung 2nm
Joins OpenAI Jalapeño, Google TPU, Meta MTIA in the LLM-company ASIC camp
Critical window for Samsung Foundry to close the 2nm yield gap with TSMC
Anthropic previously relied on AWS Trainium + Google TPU + NVIDIA Blackwell

articles.title: Meta 首次出售富余算力：从算力囤积者到算力出租方
articles.title_en: Meta Sells Excess Compute for the First Time: From Compute Hoarder to Compute Landlord
articles.summary: 7 月 1-2 日 The Information、CNBC 与澎湃新闻报道，Meta 将 2025 年为 Llama 5 系列超前采购的部分 H200/B200 GPU 通过 AWS Marketplace 与自建的 Meta Cloud Preview 平台对外出租，首批目标客户是 Anthropic、Perplexity 等模型公司与部分企业 AI 团队。这是 Meta 自 2016 年建成数据中心以来首次对外提供云 GPU 出租服务。分析人士将此解读为「大模型公司的算力囤积正在进入产能过剩阶段」，与 xAI 孟菲斯集群 10 万卡的高负荷相映成趣。
articles.summary_en: On July 1-2, The Information, CNBC, and The Paper reported that Meta is renting out excess H200/B200 GPUs — originally procured in 2025 for the Llama 5 line — via AWS Marketplace and its own Meta Cloud Preview platform. Initial customers include Anthropic, Perplexity, and some enterprise AI teams. This is Meta's first external cloud GPU rental since building its first data center in 2016. Analysts read it as «LLM-company compute hoarding entering an overcapacity phase,» in stark contrast to xAI's 100k-card Memphis cluster running full-tilt.
articles.source: The Information / CNBC / 澎湃新闻 / 每日经济新闻
articles.source_en: The Information / CNBC / The Paper / NBD
articles.content: Meta 2025 年为下一代 Llama 5 与 Llama 5V 系列采购了远超训练需要的 GPU，据 The Information 引述的内部数据，Llama 5 的实际训练仅用掉预算的 62%，剩余 38% 的产能与 2026 年新增机架合计形成明显富余。CFO Susan Li 在 5 月投资者会上首次提及「compute monetization」概念，指的正是这次算力对外出租。首批出租机型以 H200 8 卡节点为主，起租量 512 卡起、月度包年，价格显著低于 AWS/Azure 的 GPU 竞价实例。这个动作可能重塑 2026 下半年的算力供给格局——过去两年，算力短缺始终被视作大模型军备竞赛的核心瓶颈；一旦头部囤货者开始对外出租，短缺论会被重新校准。
articles.content_en: Meta over-procured GPUs in 2025 for Llama 5 and Llama 5V; per internal data cited by The Information, Llama 5 training used only 62% of the budgeted compute, and the remaining 38% plus 2026 new racks forms an obvious surplus. CFO Susan Li first mentioned «compute monetization» at the May investor day. Initial rentals feature H200 8-GPU nodes with 512-card minimums on monthly/annual commitments — priced meaningfully below AWS/Azure GPU spot instances. The move could reshape H2 2026 compute supply: after two years of «compute shortage» framing the AI arms race, hoarders turning landlords will recalibrate the shortage narrative.
key_points: Meta 首次对外出租富余 H200/B200 GPU，通过 AWS Marketplace + 自建 Meta Cloud Preview
Llama 5 训练实际用掉预算的 62%，剩余 38% + 2026 新增机架形成富余
首批客户 Anthropic、Perplexity 等模型公司与部分企业 AI 团队
起租 512 卡起，价格低于 AWS/Azure GPU 竞价实例
「算力囤积者变算力出租方」——大模型算力供需格局可能重定价
key_points_en: Meta rents excess H200/B200 GPUs externally for the first time via AWS Marketplace and Meta Cloud Preview
Llama 5 training used only 62% of budgeted compute; 38% + new 2026 racks form the surplus
Initial customers: Anthropic, Perplexity and enterprise AI teams
Minimum rental of 512 cards; priced below AWS/Azure GPU spot instances
«Compute hoarder turned compute landlord» — reshapes H2 2026 compute supply narrative

articles.title: 快手可灵完成 20 亿美元融资：视频生成赛道跑出中国头号玩家
articles.title_en: Kuaishou's Kling Closes $2B Round: China's Leading Player Emerges in Video Generation
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日 36 氪与晚点 LatePost 独家披露，快手旗下 AI 视频生成产品「可灵（Kling）」独立分拆后的融资轮已完成，规模 20 亿美元，投后估值超过 120 亿美元，领投方为高瓴创投、红杉中国与阿布扎比主权基金 MGX，快手集团保留控股。可灵 2.0 版本发布于 2026 年 5 月，凭借「10 秒 1080p 视频 4 分钟出片」的性能一度让全球视频生成赛道的价格标杆下移 40%。此番融资后可灵将进入「面向 C 端订阅 + 面向 B 端 API + 面向广告主创意平台」三线并进阶段。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, 36Kr and LatePost exclusively reported that Kuaishou's AI video generation product Kling (spun off as an independent entity) has closed a $2B round at a post-money valuation exceeding $12B. Lead investors include Hillhouse Ventures, Sequoia China, and Abu Dhabi's MGX sovereign fund; Kuaishou Group retains majority control. Kling 2.0, launched in May 2026, delivers «10-second 1080p video in 4 minutes» — enough to push the global video generation price benchmark down 40%. Post-round, Kling will pursue three parallel tracks: consumer subscriptions, B2B APIs, and advertiser creative platforms.
articles.source: 36 氪 / 晚点 LatePost / 界面新闻 / 财经杂志
articles.content: 可灵在 2024 年 6 月发布 1.0 版本后一年内完成 6 次大版本迭代，2026 年 5 月上线 2.0 后核心指标：单条 10 秒 1080p 视频推理 4 分钟出片、支持镜头运动一致性、支持角色 IP 保持、支持文本到视频与图像到视频双入口。2026 年 6 月月活用户突破 3200 万，海外版 KlingAI 在东南亚、中东、拉美三地区 App Store 应用榜 Top 10。这次 20 亿美元融资背后，一方面是可灵已经从「快手内部产品」升级为「独立商业实体」，另一方面是全球视频生成赛道的两条主线——OpenAI Sora 的「战略级弱化」（Sora 应用被 OpenAI 明确边缘化，算力资源转移到 Codex/企业市场）与 Google Veo、Runway Gen-4 的技术代差，让可灵获得罕见的窗口期。
articles.content_en: Since launching v1.0 in June 2024, Kling has shipped six major versions in one year. Key v2.0 metrics: 10-second 1080p video inferred in 4 minutes, camera motion consistency, character IP persistence, and dual text-to-video / image-to-video pipelines. June 2026 MAU crossed 32M; overseas version KlingAI ranked in App Store top 10 across Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America. The $2B round reflects two dynamics: Kling's transition from Kuaishou-internal product to standalone commercial entity, and a rare window created by OpenAI Sora's strategic de-emphasis (compute shifted to Codex and enterprise) alongside the technology gap of Google Veo and Runway Gen-4.
key_points: 可灵 20 亿美元融资，投后估值超 120 亿美元
领投方：高瓴创投、红杉中国、阿布扎比 MGX；快手保留控股
国内视频生成头号玩家，海外版 KlingAI 覆盖东南亚/中东/拉美 App Store Top 10
分拆后三线并进：C 端订阅 + B 端 API + 广告主创意平台
key_points_en: Kling closes $2B round at over $12B post-money valuation
Led by Hillhouse Ventures, Sequoia China, and Abu Dhabi's MGX; Kuaishou retains majority
Kling 2.0 (May 2026): 10-second 1080p video in 4 minutes; MAU 32M
China's leading video generation player; overseas KlingAI in App Store top 10 across SEA/MENA/LATAM
Post-spinoff three-track strategy: consumer subs + B2B API + advertiser creative platform

articles.title: 英矽智能与武田制药签下 6 亿美元合作：AI 制药进入「里程碑级验证」阶段
articles.title_en: Insilico Medicine Signs $600M Deal with Takeda: AI Drug Discovery Enters «Milestone-Grade Validation»
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日英矽智能（Insilico Medicine）与武田制药共同宣布双方达成一项总规模 6 亿美元的合作，覆盖多个纤维化与炎症疾病候选药物的临床开发。这是英矽智能继 2024 年与美纳里尼、2025 年与勃林格殷格翰之后的第三份「里程碑级」BD 大单，也是全球 AI 制药领域 2026 上半年最大额单一合作之一。英矽 Pharma.AI 平台自 2016 年起持续迭代，已产出多款候选药物进入 II 期临床，其中特发性肺纤维化候选药 ISM001-055 已在中美双报 II 期。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, Insilico Medicine and Takeda Pharmaceutical jointly announced a partnership worth up to $600M covering multiple fibrosis and inflammation drug candidates through clinical development. This is Insilico's third «milestone-grade» BD deal after Menarini (2024) and Boehringer Ingelheim (2025), and among the largest single AI-drug-discovery partnerships in H1 2026. Insilico's Pharma.AI platform, in continuous iteration since 2016, has produced several candidates in Phase II, including ISM001-055 for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis now in dual China-US Phase II trials.
articles.source: 英矽智能官网 / 财经杂志 / 医药魔方 / Endpoints News
articles.source_en: Insilico Medicine Official / Caijing / PharmCube / Endpoints News
articles.content: 本次合作签约金 4000 万美元，剩余部分为按候选药物进入 I/II/III 期以及上市阶段分批支付的里程碑款；另外还包含商业化后的销售分成，因此总规模上限「6 亿美元」中至少有 5 亿美元与临床进展绑定。英矽智能 Pharma.AI 平台由三大模块构成：PandaOmics（靶点发现）、Chemistry42（分子设计）、InClinico（临床试验预测）；2024 年至今该平台已经与超过 40 家跨国药企建立不同深度合作。武田此次选择英矽，重点在于英矽在纤维化、炎症、老龄疾病赛道积累的靶点池。产业含义在于：AI 制药过去五年一直被质疑「只发现了新靶点、没上市新药」，但里程碑级 BD 合作的密度增加，意味着大药企开始为 AI 生成的临床前候选药物付费——这是 AI 制药从「PPT 阶段」走向「工业化管线」的关键信号。
articles.content_en: The upfront payment is $40M, with the remainder in milestones tied to Phase I/II/III and commercialization, plus post-launch royalties — meaning at least $500M of the $600M cap is tied to clinical progression. Insilico's Pharma.AI has three modules: PandaOmics (target discovery), Chemistry42 (molecule design), and InClinico (clinical trial prediction). Since 2024 the platform has partnered with over 40 multinational pharma companies at varying depth. Takeda specifically taps Insilico's target pool in fibrosis, inflammation, and aging diseases. The industrial implication: after five years of criticism that AI drug discovery «only finds targets, doesn't ship drugs,» the rising density of milestone-grade BD deals means big pharma is paying for AI-generated preclinical candidates — a critical signal that AI drug discovery is moving from PPT to industrialized pipeline.
key_points: 英矽智能与武田制药签订总规模 6 亿美元合作，覆盖纤维化与炎症疾病候选药
签约金 4000 万美元，其余按临床进展分批支付
英矽 Pharma.AI 平台：PandaOmics + Chemistry42 + InClinico 三模块
英矽已与超过 40 家跨国药企建立合作
AI 制药从「PPT 阶段」走向「工业化管线」的关键信号
key_points_en: Insilico Medicine and Takeda ink $600M deal covering fibrosis and inflammation candidates
Upfront $40M; remainder paid in milestones tied to clinical progression
Insilico's Pharma.AI: PandaOmics + Chemistry42 + InClinico modules

articles.title: 优必选 U1 人形机器人预售破 1.3 万台：具身智能真正意义上的商业化验证
articles.title_en: UBTECH's U1 Humanoid Robot Presells 13,000 Units: Real Commercial Validation for Embodied AI
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日优必选（UBTECH）官方公布，面向消费级市场的 U1 家用人形机器人预售 45 天内订单突破 1.3 万台，成为全球首个消费级人形机器人预售破万的商业案例。U1 定位「家庭助手 + 老年陪护」双场景，预售价 6.98 万-9.98 万元，2026 年 Q4 首批交付。该机器人搭载优必选自研 Walker 系列关节+具身智能大模型 UBRAIN 3.0，是继特斯拉 Optimus、Figure AI、宇树 H2 之后，第一款真正意义上以「量产订单」而非「概念视频」定义商业化的产品。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, UBTECH announced its consumer humanoid robot U1 has taken over 13,000 preorders in 45 days — the first consumer humanoid to cross 10,000 preorders globally. U1 targets home assistant plus elderly companion use cases, priced at RMB 69,800-99,800, with initial deliveries in Q4 2026. It's powered by UBTECH's Walker-series joints and the in-house UBRAIN 3.0 embodied intelligence model. After Tesla Optimus, Figure AI, and Unitree H2, U1 is the first embodied AI product to define commercialization by «shipping orders» rather than «concept videos».
articles.source: 优必选官方 / 澎湃新闻 / 财新 / IT 之家
articles.source_en: UBTECH Official / The Paper / Caixin / IT Home
articles.content: U1 身高 132cm、重量 45kg，双足行走，最大负载 5kg，续航 4 小时，具身智能大模型 UBRAIN 3.0 支持视觉-语言-动作端到端指令。相比目前市面上 Optimus、Figure 02、宇树 H2 主打「工业演示」的定位，U1 直接面向消费级——最典型的使用场景是室内地板清理、简单物品取送、老年人跌倒识别与主动呼救、儿童陪伴对话。1.3 万台预售数据背后，35% 订单来自广东、上海、北京、江苏、浙江五个省市，25% 订单来自海外（美国、日本、韩国、德国），说明「消费级人形机器人」并非中国独有市场。这次预售的商业含义在于——具身智能不再是「实验室 demo」或「工业场景内部试点」，而是消费者真金白银下单的产品。这为 2027 年整个人形机器人赛道从「投资催热」转向「订单验证」提供了首个可追踪的基准。
articles.content_en: U1 stands 132cm tall, weighs 45kg, walks bipedally, carries up to 5kg with 4-hour battery life. Its UBRAIN 3.0 model supports end-to-end vision-language-action instruction. Unlike Optimus, Figure 02, and Unitree H2, which primarily target industrial demos, U1 goes straight to consumers — typical uses include indoor floor cleaning, item fetching, elderly fall detection with active alerts, and companionship for children. Of the 13,000 preorders, 35% come from five Chinese provinces (Guangdong, Shanghai, Beijing, Jiangsu, Zhejiang), and 25% from overseas (US, Japan, Korea, Germany), showing consumer humanoids aren't a China-only market. The commercial implication: embodied AI has moved beyond lab demos and factory pilots — consumers are paying real money. This gives the humanoid track its first trackable benchmark shifting from «investment-fueled hype» to «order-validated commercialization» in 2027.

定位「家庭助手 + 老年陪护」，预售价 6.98-9.98 万元，2026 Q4 首批交付

35% 订单来自广东/沪/京/苏/浙五地，25% 订单来自海外
首个消费级人形机器人破万预售，具身智能商业化真正落地

Positioned as «home assistant + elderly companion», priced RMB 69.8k-99.8k, Q4 2026 initial deliveries

articles.title: 智谱 GLM-5.2 744B 开源发布：中国开源大模型阵营再添「万亿级」新成员
articles.title_en: Zhipu Open-Sources GLM-5.2 744B: A New «Near-Trillion» Member Joins China's Open LLM Camp
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日智谱 AI 正式发布 GLM-5.2，包括 744B 稠密+MoE 混合架构主模型、32B 蒸馏版、9B 端侧版三档，主模型完整权重与代码在 Hugging Face、ModelScope 与 GitHub 三处 MIT 协议开源。GLM-5.2 主模型在 MMLU-Pro、SWE-Bench Pro、GPQA-Diamond 三项主流评测上达到 GPT-5.6 Terra 与 Claude Opus 4.8 之间的水平，同时把训练成本压到 2100 万美元级——比同参数量的闭源模型低约 60%。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, Zhipu AI released GLM-5.2 with three tiers: a 744B dense-plus-MoE hybrid flagship, a 32B distilled version, and a 9B edge version. Full weights and code for the flagship are MIT-licensed on Hugging Face, ModelScope, and GitHub. GLM-5.2 sits between GPT-5.6 Terra and Claude Opus 4.8 on MMLU-Pro, SWE-Bench Pro, and GPQA-Diamond, while training cost is held to ~$21M — roughly 60% below closed-source models at similar parameter counts.
articles.source: 智谱 AI 官方 / 机器之心 / InfoQ / Hugging Face
articles.source_en: Zhipu AI / Synced / InfoQ / Hugging Face
articles.content: GLM-5.2 是继 DeepSeek V4、Qwen 3.6、LongCat 2.0 之后 2026 年上半年第四款「万亿级」中国开源大模型。三档设计是明确的产业信号：744B 主模型面向云侧 API 与推理平台、32B 蒸馏版面向单机 8 卡企业部署、9B 端侧版面向手机与本地推理。三档一起发布，意味着智谱把「开源大模型 + 商用 API + 私有化部署」三条链路一次性打通。这次开源另一个关键点是「训练可复现」——智谱同时开放了完整的训练日志、数据 mixing 配方与损失曲线，任何机构只要有 2000 张 H100 集群，可以完整复现 744B 主模型的训练。这是过去三年中国开源大模型阵营中「可复现级」开源的最大力度。
articles.content_en: GLM-5.2 is the fourth China-origin «near-trillion» open LLM of H1 2026, after DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, and LongCat 2.0. The three-tier release signals a clear industrial layout: the 744B flagship for cloud API and inference platforms, the 32B distilled version for single-machine 8-GPU enterprise deployment, and the 9B edge version for phones and local inference. Releasing all three at once means Zhipu is opening «open-source model + commercial API + on-premise deployment» in a single stroke. Another key point: this release is «training-reproducible» — Zhipu also opens the full training log, data mixing recipe, and loss curves, so any organization with a 2000-H100 cluster can fully reproduce training. This is the strongest «reproducible-grade» open-sourcing in China's LLM camp in three years.
key_points: 智谱 GLM-5.2 三档发布：744B 主模型 + 32B 蒸馏版 + 9B 端侧版
MIT 协议开源，Hugging Face / ModelScope / GitHub 三处发布
评测水平位于 GPT-5.6 Terra 与 Claude Opus 4.8 之间
训练成本 2100 万美元级，比同规模闭源模型低约 60%
首次开放完整训练日志、数据 mixing 配方与损失曲线——「训练可复现」级开源
key_points_en: Zhipu GLM-5.2 released in three tiers: 744B flagship + 32B distilled + 9B edge
MIT-licensed on Hugging Face, ModelScope, and GitHub
Benchmark performance sits between GPT-5.6 Terra and Claude Opus 4.8
Training cost ~$21M — about 60% below closed-source models at similar parameter counts
First-time full release of training logs, data mixing recipes, and loss curves — «training-reproducible» open source

articles.title: 学而思 T6 学习机 + 培优 AI 家教发布：AI 教育从「入门试水」进入「主力配置」
articles.title_en: TAL's T6 Learning Tablet and Peiyou AI Tutor Launch: AI Education Enters «Mainstream Configuration»
articles.summary: 7 月 2 日好未来（学而思）正式发布学而思学习机 T6 与「培优 AI 家教」订阅服务。T6 硬件搭载自研九章大模型 3.0 与 8 路多模态感知，售价 6999 元起；培优 AI 家教定位「1V1 陪伴式教学」，覆盖小学、初中、高中 K12 全学段，月费 199 元。这是继科大讯飞星火儿童学习机、有道子曰教育大模型、猿辅导小猿 AI 之后，AI 教育硬件+订阅一体化的又一「重资产打法」代表案例。同期长沙、深圳、广州多所公办学校推出「AI 自主学」项目，与教育部 2025 年 4 月《AI+教育》行动计划形成呼应。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, TAL Education launched the T6 learning tablet and the «Peiyou AI Tutor» subscription. T6 hardware runs TAL's in-house Jiuzhang LLM 3.0 with 8-channel multimodal sensing, priced from RMB 6,999; the AI Tutor targets «1-on-1 companion teaching» across K-12, at RMB 199/month. Following iFLYTEK Spark, NetEase Youdao's Ziyue, and Yuanfudao's Xiaoyuan AI, this is another «heavy-asset play» combining AI education hardware and subscription. Concurrently, public schools in Changsha, Shenzhen, and Guangzhou have rolled out «AI Autonomous Learning» programs echoing the MOE's April 2025 «AI+Education» action plan.
articles.source: 好未来官方 / 澎湃新闻 / 每日经济新闻 / 芥末堆
articles.source_en: TAL Official / The Paper / NBD / Jiemo
articles.content: 学而思 T6 的核心卖点是九章大模型 3.0——2026 年 3 月完成 700 亿参数 K12 学科垂直预训练。硬件层面 T6 配备 13 英寸雾面屏、8 路多模态感知（视觉 + 语音 + 手写笔迹 + 姿势），支持「练习 → 讲解 → 拓展 → 复盘」四步闭环。培优 AI 家教则是订阅服务，与硬件解耦——不买 T6 也能通过 iPad/手机使用，但完整体验需要 T6 的多模态感知加持。定价上，硬件 6999 元起、月费 199 元的组合，直接对标线下 1V1 名师价格（150-500 元/次）——3 个月的 AI 家教订阅成本仅相当于 1-3 次线下 1V1 课时费。这个价格锚让 AI 家教从「补充手段」升级为「主力配置」。长沙 8 所学校启动 AI 自主学项目、深圳市 100 万学生完成 AI 素养测评、广州 26 所高中试点 AI 教辅——一系列信号说明公办教育系统对 AI 教辅的接受度正在快速跃升。
articles.content_en: The T6's core hook is Jiuzhang LLM 3.0 — a 70B K-12-subject vertically pretrained model completed in March 2026. The T6 hardware features a 13-inch matte display and 8-channel multimodal sensing (vision, voice, handwriting, posture), supporting a «practice → explain → extend → review» closed loop. The Peiyou AI Tutor is a subscription decoupled from the hardware — usable on iPad/phone but reaches full experience only with T6. Priced at RMB 6,999 hardware + RMB 199/month subscription, the combo directly targets offline 1-on-1 pricing (RMB 150-500 per session) — three months of AI tutoring equals only 1-3 offline sessions. This price anchor lifts AI tutoring from «supplement» to «mainstream configuration». Signals include: 8 Changsha schools launching AI Autonomous Learning, 1M Shenzhen students completing AI literacy assessment, and 26 Guangzhou high schools piloting AI teaching assistants — all pointing to rapid uptake of AI in the public education system.
key_points: 学而思 T6 学习机售价 6999 元起，搭载自研九章大模型 3.0

articles.title: AI 医疗器械获批累计 207 款、华为盘古医疗 3.0 发布：AI 医疗进入「集群化落地」阶段
articles.title_en: AI Medical Device Approvals Hit 207 Cumulative, Huawei Pangu Medical 3.0 Launches: AI Healthcare Enters «Cluster Deployment» Phase
articles.summary: 截至 2026 年 6 月国家药监局累计批准 AI 医疗器械（三类）207 款，覆盖医学影像、心电、眼底、病理、药物筛选五大主赛道，2026 上半年新获批 41 款（同比增长 76%）。6 月 30 日华为发布盘古医疗大模型 3.0，把「多模态病历理解 + 医学影像 + 电子病例 + 用药推理」整合到统一底座，宣布已在广东省第二人民医院、瑞金医院等 12 家三甲医院完成部署。三个信号叠加，AI 医疗从「点状获批」进入「集群化落地」阶段。
articles.summary_en: As of June 2026, China's NMPA has cumulatively approved 207 Class-III AI medical devices spanning imaging, ECG, ophthalmology, pathology, and drug discovery, with 41 new approvals in H1 2026 (+76% YoY). On June 30, Huawei released the Pangu Medical Model 3.0, unifying «multimodal EMR understanding + medical imaging + electronic case histories + medication reasoning» on a single foundation and announcing deployment at 12 tier-3 hospitals including Guangdong Second People's Hospital and Ruijin Hospital. Three signals stacked mean AI healthcare has moved from «point-approvals» to «cluster deployment».
articles.source: 国家药监局 / 华为 / 财新 / 医药魔方
articles.content: 207 款 AI 医疗器械的分布数据：医学影像 133 款（占 64%）、心电 32 款、眼底 21 款、病理 12 款、药物筛选 9 款。医学影像仍是绝对主力，但心电与眼底获批速度在 2026 上半年明显加速——本质上是「AI 辅助诊断」从三级医院向二级医院、社区医院下沉。华为盘古医疗 3.0 相对 2.0 的最大跃迁在于「多模态融合」：过去电子病历、影像 DICOM 数据、检验数值、用药记录是几套独立模型，盘古 3.0 用统一底座处理，为医生生成「结构化建议 + 影像标注 + 检查项建议 + 用药风险提示」四合一诊断辅助。这次同时公布 12 家三甲医院合作，说明 AI 医疗大模型的部署路径已经清晰——不再是「医院自建」或「厂商私有」，而是「厂商大模型 + 医院数据 + 三级医院临床验证」的三方协作模式。国家医保局同期公布的数据显示，2026 年 6 月起 AI 影像辅助诊断服务已纳入 17 个省市的医保支付目录——支付端的打通，是 AI 医疗真正从「工具」变「生态」的关键。
articles.content_en: Distribution of the 207 approvals: medical imaging 133 (64%), ECG 32, ophthalmology 21, pathology 12, drug discovery 9. Imaging remains dominant, but ECG and ophthalmology approvals accelerated markedly in H1 2026 — essentially «AI-assisted diagnosis» is descending from tier-3 hospitals to secondary and community hospitals. Pangu Medical 3.0's biggest leap over 2.0 is «multimodal fusion»: previously EMR, DICOM imaging, lab values, and medication records lived in separate models; Pangu 3.0 handles them on a unified foundation, generating «structured recommendations + imaging annotation + follow-up suggestions + medication risk alerts» — a four-in-one diagnostic assistant. The concurrent partnership with 12 tier-3 hospitals shows AI healthcare LLM deployment now follows a clear path: not «hospital-built» or «vendor-owned» but «vendor foundation model + hospital data + tier-3 clinical validation» three-way collaboration. NHSA data released the same week: as of June 2026, AI-assisted imaging diagnostic services are covered by 17 provincial/city insurance formularies — payment-side breakthrough is the key for AI healthcare to shift from «tool» to «ecosystem».
key_points: 国家药监局累计批准 AI 医疗器械 207 款（截至 2026-06），2026 上半年新增 41 款（+76%）

AI 医疗从「点状获批」进入「集群化落地」阶段

hero.source_en: The Information / Wall Street CN / 36Kr / IT Home / Xinhua
hero.summary: 6 月 30 日 The Information 首发报道，OpenAI 通过一整套软件层系统优化把模型推理成本压低 50% 以上——不换芯片、不换架构，仅靠服务器利用率提升、KV Cache 复用、量化压缩、动态批量四板斧，就让 ChatGPT 匿名访客流量能用「几百块 NVIDIA GPU」兜住。同一周 OpenAI 官方页公布 GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna 三档定价，Terra 输入 $2.5 / 输出 $15 每 M token，正好是上代 GPT-5.5 的一半。价格与成本同一节拍点砍下——这不是孤立的效率优化，而是 AI 从「贵重装备」变成「电力级基础设施」的产业拐点。
hero.summary_en: On June 30, The Information broke the story that OpenAI cut model inference cost by more than 50% through pure software-layer optimizations — no new chips, no new architecture, just higher server utilization, KV Cache reuse, quantization and dynamic batching. The result: ChatGPT's anonymous traffic is now served by «a few hundred NVIDIA GPUs». The same week, OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna tiered pricing, with Terra at $2.5 input / $15 output per M tokens — exactly half of last-gen GPT-5.5. Cost and price came down on the same beat. This is not a one-off efficiency win, but the industrial inflection point that turns AI from a «premium capital good» into a «utility-grade infrastructure».

articles.title: OpenAI 推理成本降幅超 50%，「几百块 GPU」撑起 ChatGPT 匿名访客流量
articles.title_en: OpenAI Cuts Inference Cost by 50%+, A Few Hundred GPUs Now Serve ChatGPT Anonymous Traffic
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日 The Information 记者 Steph Palazzolo 报道，OpenAI 工程团队通过一整套软件层系统优化把模型推理成本降低 50% 以上——「几乎没用新芯片、没换架构」，完全靠现有服务器利用率提升、KV Cache 复用、量化压缩、动态批量四板斧。落地场景之一是 ChatGPT 匿名/未登录访客流量，「几百块 NVIDIA GPU」就能兜住每天数亿次调用。OpenAI 将该方案视为「secret sauce」核心机密。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, The Information's Steph Palazzolo reported that OpenAI's engineering team cut inference cost by more than 50% through system-level software optimizations — «almost no new chips, no new architecture» — just higher utilization on existing servers, KV Cache reuse, quantization and dynamic batching. One landing point: ChatGPT anonymous / logged-out traffic is now served by «a few hundred NVIDIA GPUs», handling hundreds of millions of daily calls. OpenAI treats the recipe as internal «secret sauce».
articles.source: The Information / 华尔街见闻
articles.content: 本次降本降幅口径指「运行同等推理负载所需的算力开销」，不是 API 售价。技术路径主要在软件层：服务器利用率提升、量化压缩、KV Cache 复用、动态批量处理。硬件层面，OpenAI 与博通合作的自研 ASIC 推理芯片 Jalapeño 预计 2027 年批量部署，理论上还能再降 50%。据 36 氪 7-1 报道，OpenAI 把该方案视为核心机密，甚至限制内部员工知情范围以防被 Anthropic、Google 复刻。价格联动上，GPT-5.6 Terra 定价直接对齐「上代 GPT-5.5 一半」，反映出 OpenAI 已经把降本的一部分传导到市场端。产业含义：AI 推理开始进入「工程复利曲线」，与 Anthropic 推理毛利率 18 个月从 -94% 冲到 60%+ 的改善节奏一致。
articles.content_en: The «50%+ cut» refers to the compute cost of running an equivalent inference workload, not the API list price. The path is software-first: utilization gains, quantization, KV Cache reuse, and dynamic batching. On hardware, OpenAI's Broadcom-partnered custom ASIC Jalapeño is expected to volume-deploy in 2027 with roughly another 50% cut. Per 36Kr, OpenAI treats the recipe as strategic secret sauce and restricts internal circulation to prevent cloning by Anthropic and Google. On price, GPT-5.6 Terra sticker is exactly half of the previous flagship GPT-5.5, showing OpenAI has already passed part of the cut to the market. The industrial implication: AI inference is now on an «engineering-compounding curve», mirroring Anthropic's inference gross margin swing from -94% to 60%+ in 18 months.
key_points: 推理成本降幅 >50%，不涉及新芯片或新架构，纯软件层优化
ChatGPT 匿名访客流量「几百块 NVIDIA GPU」即可承接
GPT-5.6 Terra 定价直接对齐上代 GPT-5.5 一半（$2.5/$15）
OpenAI 视为「secret sauce」保密方案，2027 年将叠加 Jalapeño ASIC
key_points_en: Inference cost cut by more than 50%, purely at the software layer, no new silicon
ChatGPT anonymous traffic now served by «a few hundred NVIDIA GPUs»
GPT-5.6 Terra sticker priced at half of the previous flagship GPT-5.5 ($2.5/$15)
OpenAI treats it as «secret sauce»; Broadcom ASIC Jalapeño to volume-deploy in 2027

articles.title: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna 三档定价，Terra 直接砍半
articles.title_en: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna Three-Tier Pricing, Terra Priced at Half
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日 OpenAI 官方定价页更新 GPT-5.6 三档产品：Sol $5/$30、Terra $2.5/$15、Luna $1/$6（每 M token）。Terra 被官方描述为「性能接近上一代旗舰 GPT-5.5，成本仅其一半」，直接把「梯队路由」从概念变成 API 层的默认结构。据新华社 7-1 报道，该三档产品目前先向约 20 家审核合作方开放，稳定后转开放访问。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, OpenAI's official pricing page unveiled the GPT-5.6 three-tier lineup: Sol $5/$30, Terra $2.5/$15, and Luna $1/$6 per M tokens. OpenAI describes Terra as «approaching GPT-5.5 flagship capability at half the cost», elevating «tiered routing» from concept to a default API structure. Per Xinhua on 7-1, the three tiers are first rolled out to roughly 20 review partners before general availability.
articles.source: OpenAI 官方定价页 / 新华社
articles.content: GPT-5.6 三档设计的战略意义远超「一次降价」。过去三年 OpenAI 定价逻辑是「一款旗舰 + 一款廉价备胎」，这次三档拆分让「一次任务用一整套模型编排」变成默认结构：60% 日常任务用 Luna、30% 需能力保底用 Terra、10% 极限性能用 Sol。业内测算，从「一律 Sol」切到「三档编排」的 SaaS 团队，月账单可下降 60% 以上。这对 Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 的 $5/$25、Google Gemini 3 Pro 的 $1.25/$10 都构成新的性价比压力——Terra 正好卡在中位数价位，直击「日常任务用 Sonnet、Flash 或 Nano」的开发者选择区间。
articles.content_en: The strategic significance of the three-tier design goes well beyond a one-off price cut. For three years OpenAI's playbook was «one flagship + one cheap fallback»; this three-tier split makes «task-level model orchestration» the default: 60% daily tasks on Luna, 30% capability-guarded tasks on Terra, 10% max-performance tasks on Sol. Industry estimates show SaaS teams switching from «always Sol» to «three-tier routing» can cut monthly bills by 60%+. This puts new price-performance pressure on Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 ($5/$25) and Google Gemini 3 Pro ($1.25/$10) — Terra sits right at the median price, directly aimed at the «daily-task Sonnet / Flash / Nano» slot.
key_points: GPT-5.6 三档定价：Sol $5/$30、Terra $2.5/$15、Luna $1/$6（每 M token）
Terra 官方定位「性能接近 GPT-5.5、成本减半」
首批向约 20 家审核合作方开放，随后开放访问
对 Anthropic Opus 4.8、Google Gemini 3 Pro 构成新性价比压力
key_points_en: GPT-5.6 three tiers: Sol $5/$30, Terra $2.5/$15, Luna $1/$6 per M tokens
Terra positioned as «GPT-5.5-class performance at half the cost»
First rolled out to ~20 review partners before general access
Puts new price-performance pressure on Anthropic Opus 4.8 and Google Gemini 3 Pro

articles.title: 马斯克宣布 Grok 4.5 已在 SpaceX/特斯拉内测，承诺 xAI 今年剩余时间每月发布一款全新基础模型
articles.title_en: Musk Says Grok 4.5 Is in Beta at SpaceX/Tesla, Pledges xAI Will Release One All-New Foundation Model Every Month for the Rest of 2026
articles.summary: 6 月 28 日深夜马斯克在 X 发推：Grok 4.5 已经在 SpaceX 与特斯拉内部 Beta 测试，「今年剩余时间 xAI 将每月发布一款全新基础模型，全部从零训练」。Grok 4.5 基于 1.5 万亿参数 V9 基础模型 + Cursor 用户编程数据补训，据接近 xAI 的匿名工程师透露，编程能力已接近 Claude Opus 4.8。xAI 计划 7 月 9 日正式发布另一批次的 Grok-4。
articles.summary_en: Late on June 28, Elon Musk posted on X that Grok 4.5 is already in Beta at SpaceX and Tesla, and that «for the rest of the year xAI will release one all-new foundation model every month, all trained from scratch». Grok 4.5 is built on a 1.5T-parameter V9 base model plus supplementary training on Cursor developer data; per engineers close to xAI, its coding capability approaches Claude Opus 4.8. xAI plans to officially launch a separate batch of Grok-4 on July 9.
articles.source: X @elonmusk / The Information
articles.content: 承诺背后是三重焦虑：一是 xAI 2000 亿美元估值需要靠迭代速度证明；二是孟菲斯 Colossus 10 万卡集群「不训练就是浪费」；三是特斯拉 FSD 想把智驾迭代从季度节奏压到月度节奏，需要月更基础模型作为底座。技术上，「30 天完成从零训练 + 后训练 + 评估 + 发布」全流程物理上极难做到，业内解读是「保留 tokenizer/词表/评估集，重新初始化权重的月更循环」。7 月 9 日的 Grok-4 官方发布、8 月的第二款模型、9 月的第三款——三个节点将决定这个承诺是营销口号还是可持续机制。
articles.content_en: Behind the pledge lie three anxieties. First, xAI's $200B valuation needs iteration speed as proof. Second, the 100K-card Colossus cluster in Memphis burns money if idle. Third, Tesla FSD wants to compress its update cadence from quarterly to monthly, which requires a monthly foundation-model base to distill from. Technically, «from-scratch train + post-train + eval + ship in 30 days» is nearly impossible; the read across the industry is that xAI will keep the tokenizer/vocab/eval sets but re-initialize weights in a monthly loop. The July 9 Grok-4 launch, the August model, and the September model are the three checkpoints that will decide whether the pledge is marketing or a real cadence.
key_points: Grok 4.5 已在 SpaceX/特斯拉内测，基于 1.5T V9 基础模型
编程能力据称接近 Claude Opus 4.8，靠 Cursor 用户编程数据补训
马斯克承诺 xAI 今年剩余时间每月发布一款全新基础模型
特斯拉 FSD 想把智驾迭代从季度压到月度，这是背后最直接的业务动机
key_points_en: Grok 4.5 already in Beta at SpaceX/Tesla, built on a 1.5T V9 base model
Coding capability reportedly approaches Claude Opus 4.8, boosted by Cursor developer data
Musk pledges xAI will release one all-new foundation model every month for the rest of 2026
Tesla FSD's push from quarterly to monthly release cadence is the underlying business driver

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 定档 7 月中旬，首创 API「峰谷分时定价」
articles.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Set for Mid-July, Introduces API's First «Peak-Valley Time-of-Use Pricing»
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日 DeepSeek 官宣 V4 定档 7 月中旬，同时首次公开「峰谷分时定价」策略：早高峰 9-12、下午 14-18 时段 API 单价上浮 20%，闲时段（22:00-次日 6:00）打 5 折。这是 API 行业首次把「电力式峰谷定价」引入大模型 SaaS，试图用价格信号把非紧急调用引导到夜间空闲算力上。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, DeepSeek confirmed V4 for mid-July and, for the first time in the API industry, unveiled a «peak-valley time-of-use pricing» plan: prices surge 20% during morning (9-12) and afternoon (14-18) peaks, and drop to 50% during the off-peak window (22:00 to 6:00 next day). This is the first time «utility-style peak-valley pricing» has entered LLM SaaS, using price signals to steer non-urgent calls toward off-peak GPU capacity.
articles.source: DeepSeek 官方 / 36 氪
articles.content: 对开发者来说，这打开了一个新的成本优化维度——过去只优化「用哪个模型」，现在还要优化「在什么时段跑」。任何非实时任务（报表生成、周会摘要、内容审核、批量翻译、AB 测试评估）都可以设置成凌晨批量跑，成本立减 50%。背后是 GPU 集群的负载均衡逻辑——AI 推理算力像电力一样存在明显的峰谷差，白天满负荷、深夜空转。DeepSeek 用价格信号引导调用时段，既提高集群 ROI 又给用户一个新的成本杠杆。业内预计其他厂商大概率会跟进类似机制。
articles.content_en: For developers, this opens a new optimization axis: it's no longer just «which model» but also «which time slot». Any non-real-time task — report generation, weekly-meeting summarization, content moderation, batch translation, A/B eval — can be scheduled overnight for an immediate 50% discount. Behind the scenes is a GPU cluster load-balancing story: inference compute mirrors electricity in its peak-valley pattern, saturated by day, idle by night. DeepSeek uses price signals to steer traffic, boosting cluster ROI and giving customers a new cost lever. Analysts expect other vendors will follow.
key_points: DeepSeek V4 定档 7 月中旬，价格对齐 V3 但增加时段维度
早高峰 9-12、下午 14-18 时段单价上浮 20%
谷段 22:00-6:00 打 5 折，鼓励非实时任务夜间调用
API 行业首次引入「电力式峰谷分时定价」
key_points_en: DeepSeek V4 set for mid-July, base price aligned with V3 plus time-of-use dimension
20% surcharge during morning (9-12) and afternoon (14-18) peaks
50% off during off-peak window 22:00-06:00, targeting non-real-time workloads
First «utility-style peak-valley pricing» in the LLM API industry

articles.title: DeepSeek + 北大发布 DSpark 推理加速框架，V4 系统上吞吐 +60% 至 +85%，MIT 开源
articles.title_en: DeepSeek + Peking University Release DSpark Inference Framework, +60% to +85% Throughput on V4, MIT-Licensed
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日，DeepSeek 与北京大学联合发布开源推理加速框架 DSpark，集成推测性解码 + 稀疏激活 + KV Cache 复用三层优化。在 DeepSeek V4 系统上测得吞吐提升 60%–85%。代码以 MIT 协议托管在 GitHub，作为对 OpenAI「secret sauce」推理优化的开源平行版本。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, DeepSeek and Peking University jointly released DSpark, an open-source inference acceleration framework combining speculative decoding, sparse activation, and KV Cache reuse. Benchmarks on DeepSeek V4 show a 60%–85% throughput gain. The code is MIT-licensed on GitHub — effectively an open-source parallel to OpenAI's «secret sauce» inference optimization.
articles.source: GitHub / 北京大学人工智能研究院
articles.source_en: GitHub / Peking University Institute for AI
articles.content: DSpark 的战略意义在于把「原本闭源厂商用来保利润的推理加速工程」搬到开源社区。同一周 OpenAI 把类似方案锁进内部保密柜，DSpark 用 MIT 协议把「推测性解码 + 稀疏激活 + KV Cache 复用」组合拳做成拿来即用的工具箱。据框架说明，V4 系统 batch=32、seq_len=8K 场景下吞吐提升 85%，长文档生成 seq_len=32K 场景吞吐提升 60%。GLM、Qwen、LongCat 等国内开源模型已在测试适配。DSpark 的存在意味着即使 OpenAI 的保密期能撑 6 个月，开源社区几乎必然在 2026 年底把类似效果复现出来，形成对闭源利润的持续压力。
articles.content_en: DSpark's strategic weight lies in moving the same inference-acceleration engineering that closed-source vendors keep as margin-preserving trade secrets into the open-source community. In the same week OpenAI locks similar tricks in a secret vault, DSpark ships «speculative decoding + sparse activation + KV Cache reuse» as an MIT-licensed toolkit. Benchmarks show 85% throughput gain at batch=32 / seq_len=8K on V4, and 60% at long-doc seq_len=32K. GLM, Qwen, LongCat and other Chinese open models are already testing integration. DSpark's existence means that even if OpenAI's secrecy lasts six months, the open-source camp will almost certainly reproduce comparable results by end-2026, creating sustained pressure on closed-source margins.
key_points: DeepSeek + 北大联合开源 DSpark 推理加速框架，MIT 协议
三层优化：推测性解码、稀疏激活、KV Cache 复用
V4 系统 batch=32、seq_len=8K 场景吞吐提升 85%
被视为 OpenAI「secret sauce」推理优化的开源平行版本
key_points_en: DeepSeek + PKU open-source DSpark inference framework, MIT-licensed
Three-layer stack: speculative decoding, sparse activation, KV Cache reuse
85% throughput gain on V4 at batch=32 / seq_len=8K
Positioned as the open-source parallel to OpenAI's «secret sauce»

articles.title: 微软发布 MAI 系列 7 款自研模型，含 MAI-Code-1-Flash 编程专用款
articles.title_en: Microsoft Debuts 7 Self-Developed MAI Models Including MAI-Code-1-Flash
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日至 7 月 1 日，微软正式发布 MAI（Microsoft AI）系列 7 款自研模型：包含通用旗舰、多模态、编程专用（MAI-Code-1-Flash）、语音、图像、翻译、Agent 等分工，全部由前 Inflection 团队与微软 AI 部门联合训练。这是微软自 2023 年重金投入自研 AI 后，第一次在同一次发布中拿出全线自研产品。
articles.summary_en: Between June 30 and July 1, Microsoft officially released the MAI (Microsoft AI) family — seven self-developed models spanning a general flagship, multimodal, coding (MAI-Code-1-Flash), speech, image, translation, and Agent variants — all trained jointly by the former Inflection team and Microsoft AI. It is the first time since Microsoft's 2023 investment in in-house AI that the company has shipped a full self-developed lineup in a single release.
articles.source: Microsoft AI Blog / The Verge
articles.content: MAI 系列的战略含义清晰——微软要在 OpenAI 之外，为 Copilot、Windows、Azure 提供备份自研栈。MAI-Code-1-Flash 是编程专用款，据博客对标 GitHub Copilot Chat 使用场景，响应速度显著高于 GPT-5.5，代码补全准确率与 Claude Sonnet 4.6 打平。其他 6 款分工是 MAI-1 通用旗舰、MAI-Vision 多模态、MAI-Voice 语音合成、MAI-Image 图像生成、MAI-Translate 多语言翻译、MAI-Agent 编排。微软的动作与近期 Meta「严控员工使用第三方 AI 代码工具」形成一致节奏——巨头都在建自研栈，减少对 OpenAI/Anthropic 的核心依赖。
articles.content_en: The strategic read is clear: outside of OpenAI, Microsoft wants a backup in-house stack for Copilot, Windows and Azure. MAI-Code-1-Flash is the coding-specific variant, targeting the same use case as GitHub Copilot Chat with materially faster response than GPT-5.5 and code-completion accuracy matching Claude Sonnet 4.6. The other six variants cover the general flagship (MAI-1), multimodal (MAI-Vision), speech (MAI-Voice), image (MAI-Image), translation (MAI-Translate), and Agent orchestration (MAI-Agent). This move rhymes with Meta's recent restrictions on third-party AI coding tools — big tech is building in-house stacks to reduce hard dependence on OpenAI/Anthropic.
key_points: 微软发布 MAI 系列 7 款自研模型，覆盖通用、编程、多模态等场景
编程款 MAI-Code-1-Flash 对标 GPT-5.5 与 Claude Sonnet 4.6
由前 Inflection 团队 + 微软 AI 部门联合训练
巨头「减少 OpenAI/Anthropic 依赖」的自研栈趋势加速
key_points_en: Microsoft ships 7 self-developed MAI models covering general, coding, multimodal, and more
Coding-focused MAI-Code-1-Flash benchmarked against GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet 4.6
Jointly trained by the former Inflection team and Microsoft AI
Signals big tech's accelerating in-house-stack trend to reduce OpenAI/Anthropic dependence

articles.title: Anthropic 秘密递交 S-1 IPO 招股书，估值 9650 亿美元
articles.title_en: Anthropic Confidentially Files S-1 for IPO at $965B Valuation
articles.summary: 据 The Information 与 Bloomberg 6 月 30 日与 7 月 1 日的报道，Anthropic 已向 SEC 秘密递交 S-1 IPO 招股书，估值区间 9500-9800 亿美元，目标 2026 年底至 2027 年上半年上市。这是继 OpenAI 7300 亿美元估值筹备 IPO 之后，AI 大模型行业第二起「万亿级 IPO」。
articles.summary_en: Per The Information and Bloomberg on June 30 – July 1, Anthropic has confidentially filed an S-1 with the SEC, targeting an IPO valuation of $950–980 billion and a listing between end-2026 and H1 2027. Following OpenAI's $730B valuation and IPO prep, this would be the second «trillion-dollar-tier IPO» in the LLM sector.
articles.source: The Information / Bloomberg
articles.content: Anthropic 秘密递交 S-1 的时机耐人寻味——同一周它公布了 Claude Opus 4.8 的 90% 缓存折扣、1M 长上下文平价、Batch API 50% 折扣三重定价工具，同时把 Q2 推理毛利率从 -94% 拉到 60%+ 的数据打给了投资者。这三件事凑在一起讲的是同一个故事：Anthropic 已经从「烧钱换市场份额」进入「利润验证」阶段，可以对公众市场讲清盈利模型。9500-9800 亿美元估值意味着上市后 Anthropic 会与 OpenAI 并列成为 AI 行业「最贵的两家纯 AI 公司」，双寡头格局在资本市场层面确立。
articles.content_en: The timing of the confidential S-1 filing is telling: in the same week Anthropic unveiled Claude Opus 4.8's 90% prompt-cache discount, 1M-context flat pricing, and 50% Batch API discount, and it briefed investors on Q2 inference margin going from -94% to 60%+. The three moves tell one story: Anthropic has graduated from «burning cash for share» to «profit validation», with a defensible earnings model ready for public markets. A $950-980B valuation puts Anthropic side-by-side with OpenAI as the two most valuable pure-play AI companies, cementing the duopoly at the capital-market level.

目标 2026 年底至 2027 年上半年上市

与 OpenAI 7300 亿估值形成 AI 行业「双寡头 IPO」格局

IPO window: end-2026 to H1 2027
Q2 inference gross margin repaired from -94% to 60%+
Forms an «AI-IPO duopoly» alongside OpenAI's $730B valuation

articles.title: Meta 严控员工使用第三方 AI 代码工具，加速自研 MetaCode
articles.title_en: Meta Restricts Employees' Use of Third-Party AI Coding Tools, Accelerates In-House MetaCode
articles.summary: 6 月底 Meta 内部备忘录曝光——公司要求全球工程师逐步停止使用 GitHub Copilot、Cursor、Windsurf 等第三方 AI 编程工具，仅允许使用内部自研的 MetaCode 与 Llama-Coder 分支。备忘录理由：核心代码泄露风险 + 加速自研工具迭代。
articles.summary_en: In late June, an internal Meta memo revealed that the company is phasing out engineer use of third-party AI coding tools including GitHub Copilot, Cursor and Windsurf, mandating internal-only MetaCode and Llama-Coder branches. The memo cites core-code leakage risk and the need to accelerate in-house tooling iteration.
articles.source: The Verge / Business Insider
articles.content: Meta 这份备忘录是「大厂封闭化」的又一次落地。过去两年 GitHub Copilot、Cursor 通过接入 OpenAI/Anthropic 顶级模型 + 深度绑定开发者工作流的方式，几乎渗透到全球所有科技公司。但对 Meta 这样极重视代码资产的巨头而言，这些工具意味着每一次代码补全都在向外部厂商传递可能包含商业机密的上下文。Meta 的封锁行为与微软发布 MAI 系列自研模型、亚马逊自研 Nova 模型形成节奏一致——巨头都在为「AI 时代的代码资产控制权」重新划线。对 Cursor 与 Windsurf 这类中间层工具而言，来自巨头企业客户的收入通道可能会持续收窄。
articles.content_en: The Meta memo is another concrete step in big-tech's «walled garden» playbook. Over the past two years, GitHub Copilot and Cursor have infiltrated virtually every tech company by wiring OpenAI/Anthropic top-tier models into deeply-integrated developer workflows. But for a code-assets-heavy giant like Meta, every completion sends context that could contain commercial secrets to an outside vendor. Meta's lockdown rhymes with Microsoft's MAI lineup and Amazon's Nova family — big tech is redrawing the line on «code asset control in the AI era». For middleware players like Cursor and Windsurf, enterprise revenue from big-tech clients could keep narrowing.
key_points: Meta 内部备忘录要求逐步停止 GitHub Copilot、Cursor、Windsurf 等第三方工具
仅允许内部自研 MetaCode 与 Llama-Coder 分支

articles.title: 具身智能 6 个月 15 家创企估值破 100 亿人民币，2026 上半年成中国机器人「爆点」
articles.title_en: Embodied AI Boom: 15 Chinese Startups Cross 10B RMB Valuation in H1 2026
articles.summary: 据机器人业内媒体统计，2026 年 1-6 月，中国具身智能与人形机器人赛道有 15 家创企估值突破 100 亿元人民币，包括宇树、逐际动力、银河通用、星动纪元、智元、乐聚等。融资节奏由「季度轮」压缩到「月度轮」，头部企业单笔融资普遍在 8-20 亿元区间。
articles.summary_en: Per Chinese robotics industry trackers, 15 embodied-AI and humanoid-robot startups crossed 10B RMB valuation in H1 2026, including Unitree, LimX Dynamics, Galaxy Universal, Robot Era, AgiBot and Leju. Funding pace has compressed from quarterly to monthly rounds, with top-tier companies typically raising 800M–2B RMB per round.
articles.source: 亿欧网 / 甲子光年
articles.content: 15 家百亿估值的具身智能创企集中出现在同一半年，是过去中国科技创投史罕见的密度。背后的三条主线：一是特斯拉 Optimus + Figure + Apptronik 三家美国头部人形机器人估值突破 100 亿美元级别，把全球锚点抬到了新高；二是英伟达 GR00T 平台把「预训练动作大模型」变成开源基建，让所有下游硬件公司都能站在同一起点；三是中国政府 2025-2026 年对「具身智能新质生产力」的持续政策倾斜，制造业场景（汽车总装、3C 组装、物流分拣）率先给出商业化订单。这 15 家里，宇树估值已破 500 亿、逐际动力破 200 亿。产业观察普遍认为，2026 年下半年是「谁能率先量产万台并跑通商业化闭环」的分水岭。
articles.content_en: Fifteen 10-billion-RMB embodied-AI startups emerging in a single half-year is a density unmatched in the history of Chinese tech venture. Three drivers converge. One: Tesla Optimus, Figure and Apptronik have all crossed $10B in the US, resetting the global anchor. Two: Nvidia GR00T turns «pretrained motion foundation models» into open infrastructure, giving every downstream hardware maker the same starting line. Three: Chinese government policy through 2025-2026 aggressively tilts toward embodied AI as «new-quality productive force», with automotive final-assembly, 3C assembly and logistics sorting giving early commercial orders. Among the 15, Unitree tops 50B RMB and LimX Dynamics exceeds 20B RMB. Consensus view: H2 2026 is the watershed for «who reaches 10K-unit mass production and closes the commercialization loop first».

H2 2026 分水岭：谁先量产万台并跑通商业化闭环

articles.title: 北京发布《AI 赋能科学研究实施方案 2026-2028》，力争 2028 建成全球科学智能创新中枢
articles.title_en: Beijing Releases «Action Plan on AI-Enabled Scientific Research 2026-2028», Targets Global Hub for Scientific-Intelligence Innovation by 2028
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日北京市政府正式发布《北京市人工智能赋能科学研究实施方案 2026-2028 年》，提出「科学智能」新概念，覆盖生物医药、材料、地球科学、能源、数学基础研究等 8 大方向；目标到 2028 年建成全球领先的科学智能创新中枢，形成 20 家以上「科学 AI 大装置 + 核心大模型」联合体。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, the Beijing municipal government released the «Action Plan on AI-Enabled Scientific Research 2026-2028», introducing the «Scientific Intelligence» concept and covering 8 directions including biomedicine, materials, earth science, energy, and foundational mathematics. Target: by 2028, build a globally leading hub for scientific-intelligence innovation with 20+ «scientific AI facility + core large-model» consortia.
articles.source: 北京市政府 / 新华社
articles.content: 方案有三个关键动作。其一，建立「科学 AI 大装置」——把国家实验室、超算中心、专用 AI 集群整合成为科研专用算力底座。其二，扶持「垂类科学大模型」——每个方向支持 2-3 家团队，做类似 AlphaFold 3、GNoME 的垂直基础模型，2028 年前形成不少于 30 款可复现的科研大模型。其三，「数据开放 + 试验田」——开放国家科学数据资源池，试点让科研机构和 AI 公司在受控环境下共同训练模型。这份方案与 2025 年国务院《关于深入实施「人工智能+」行动的意见》构成上下衔接，把 AI 与前沿科学的结合从「鼓励」推进到「工程化」阶段。DeepMind 系 AlphaFold 3 与 GNoME 已经把 AI 科研的天花板打开，中国这次方案的战略意义在于建立自己的「科学智能栈」，不做跟随。
articles.content_en: Three key actions frame the plan. One: build «Scientific AI Facilities» — integrating national labs, supercomputing centers, and dedicated AI clusters into a research-purpose compute substrate. Two: back «vertical scientific foundation models» — supporting 2-3 teams per direction to build AlphaFold-3- and GNoME-class vertical foundation models, with no fewer than 30 reproducible scientific large models by 2028. Three: «data openness + sandbox» — open a national scientific-data pool and pilot controlled environments where research institutes and AI companies co-train. The plan sits downstream of the 2025 State Council «AI+ Action» opinion, moving AI-plus-frontier-science from «encouragement» to «engineering». With DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 and GNoME already lifting the AI-for-science ceiling, the strategic point of Beijing's plan is to build its own «Scientific-Intelligence Stack» rather than follow.

落地 30 款可复现科研大模型，形成 20+ 家科研 AI 联合体

hero.title: 国产 AI 算力闭环时刻：美团 1.6 万亿 LongCat-2.0 全栈国产芯片训练 + 寒武纪同日万亿市值
hero.title_en: The Domestic AI Compute Loop Closes: Meituan's 1.6T LongCat-2.0 Trained Fully on Chinese Chips, Cambricon Hits $1T Cap Same Day
hero.summary: 6 月 30 日，美团正式开源 1.6 万亿参数 MoE 大模型 LongCat-2.0——业界首个在 5 万张国产 AI 芯片集群上完成训练 + 推理全流程的万亿大模型，原生 1M 超长上下文，35 万亿 token 预训练；同一天，国产 AI ASIC 龙头寒武纪市值首破万亿元人民币，成为科创板首家万亿级算力芯片企业。模型自主与芯片自主的「双万亿」共振，标志着中国 AI 产业正式从「依赖海外 GPU」过渡期迈入自主可控的 AI 2.0 时代。
hero.summary_en: On June 30, Meituan open-sourced LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion-parameter MoE model — the first trillion-scale model in the industry to complete both training and inference on a fully domestic chip cluster of over 50,000 Chinese AI accelerators, natively supporting 1M context and pre-trained on 35 trillion tokens. On the same day, China's leading AI ASIC maker Cambricon became the first STAR Market company to cross the 1 trillion yuan market-cap line. The dual-trillion resonance of model autonomy and silicon autonomy marks China's official transition from GPU dependence into the self-controllable AI 2.0 era.

articles.title: 美团开源 LongCat-2.0：1.6 万亿参数、5 万张国产卡训练，业界首个训推全栈国产化万亿模型
articles.title_en: Meituan Open-Sources LongCat-2.0: 1.6T Parameters, Trained on 50,000 Domestic Chips — First Trillion-Scale Model Fully Off Nvidia
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日，美团正式发布并开源新一代万亿参数大模型 LongCat-2.0：总参数 1.6T、平均激活 480 亿（动态范围 33B–56B），原生支持 1M 超长上下文。它是业界首个在 5 万张国产 AI 芯片集群上从零开始完成训练与推理全流程的万亿模型，预训练消耗 35 万亿 token，预览版已跻身 OpenRouter 全球调用量前三。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, Meituan released and open-sourced LongCat-2.0, a next-generation trillion-parameter MoE model with 1.6T total parameters, an average of 48B active (dynamic range 33B–56B), and native 1M-token context. It is the industry's first trillion-scale model trained and served end-to-end on a 50,000-card domestic AI accelerator cluster, with 35T tokens of pre-training. The preview version already ranks top-3 in global API call volume on OpenRouter.
articles.source: 美团官网 / 36 氪
articles.content: LongCat-2.0 的工程意义远超模型本身。过去三年，国产大模型尽管在推理端逐步适配国产硬件，但最核心、最考验硬件稳定性的预训练环节始终离不开英伟达 A100/H100 生态。LongCat-2.0 一次性完成了「5 万卡国产集群预训练 + 推理全链路」的工程闭环，意味着国产 AI 芯片首次具备了承载全球顶级万亿参数模型的工业级能力。技术层面，团队针对长上下文设计了 LongCat Sparse Attention（LSA）——通过流感知索引、跨层索引和分层索引，让长文本推理的 KV 读取更连续、相邻层之间可复用部分索引；同时集成 1350 亿参数的 5-gram 嵌入模块，用前置嵌入降低 MoE 路由对大 batch 显存的压力。在 SWE-bench Pro 等主流 Agent 与代码评测中，LongCat-2.0 表现已逼近甚至超越部分主流闭源模型，月调用量在 Hermes、Claude Code、OpenClaw 三大 Agent 平台分列全球第 1、第 2、第 3。
articles.content_en: The engineering significance of LongCat-2.0 goes well beyond the model itself. For the past three years, Chinese LLM teams gradually adapted inference to domestic silicon, but the most demanding pre-training stage still depended on Nvidia's A100/H100 ecosystem. LongCat-2.0 closes that loop in one shot: a 50,000-card domestic cluster handles both pre-training and serving end-to-end, proving for the first time that Chinese AI accelerators can carry a frontier-grade trillion-parameter model at industrial scale. On the technical side, the team introduces LongCat Sparse Attention (LSA) — a sparse-index design that uses flow-aware, cross-layer, and hierarchical indexing to make long-context KV reads sequential and reusable across adjacent layers. A 135B-parameter 5-gram embedding module also reduces MoE routing pressure on memory under large-batch inference. On SWE-bench Pro and other agentic-coding benchmarks, LongCat-2.0 closes in on — and in some cases surpasses — leading closed-source models. Its preview version already ranks #1, #2 and #3 by monthly API calls on the Hermes, Claude Code, and OpenClaw agent platforms respectively.
key_points: 1.6T 总参数 MoE，平均激活 48B（动态 33B–56B），原生 1M 超长上下文
业界首个 5 万张国产 AI 芯片集群完成训练 + 推理全流程的万亿大模型
35 万亿 token 预训练，LSA 稀疏注意力 + 1350 亿 5-gram 嵌入双优化
预览版跻身 OpenRouter 全球调用量前三，已对外开源
key_points_en: 1.6T total parameters MoE, ~48B active (dynamic 33B–56B), native 1M context
First trillion-scale model in the industry trained and served end-to-end on a 50,000-card domestic cluster

articles.title: 寒武纪市值首破万亿，成为科创板首家万亿级 AI 算力芯片企业
articles.title_en: Cambricon Crosses $1 Trillion Yuan Market Cap, Becomes First Trillion-Yuan AI Chip Stock on STAR Market
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日，国产 AI ASIC 龙头寒武纪市值正式突破 1 万亿元人民币，成为科创板首家万亿级算力芯片企业。资本市场用万亿定价，与同日发布的美团 LongCat-2.0 国产算力训练共同标志着「AI 自主可控」从产业故事正式变成产业现实——国产算力闭环不仅是工程能力，也是市场共识。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, China's leading AI ASIC vendor Cambricon crossed 1 trillion yuan in market cap, becoming the first trillion-yuan AI chip stock on the STAR Market. The capital-market verdict, arriving the same day as Meituan's LongCat-2.0 trained on domestic silicon, signals that AI self-sufficiency in China has moved from an industry narrative to an industry reality — the domestic compute loop is now both an engineering and a market consensus.
articles.source: 财联社 / 林毅观察
articles.content: 寒武纪万亿市值的关键意义在于「定价确权」。过去 18 个月，国产 AI ASIC 经历了「发布即跑通—中小客户试用—头部模型适配—资本市场承认」四阶段，寒武纪万亿市值是其中第四阶段的终点。同日，美团 LongCat-2.0 用 5 万张国产卡完成训练，国信、华为昇腾、海光等国产算力厂商在过去一周也相继公布大客户合同。从产业角度，这一万亿市值落到的不是某个单一芯片型号，而是「AI 芯片厂商作为算力底座」的资本范畴——它意味着未来三年国产晶圆产能、半导体设备、半导体材料三层供应链都将进入扩产周期，AI 2.0 的硬制造主线正式成型。
articles.content_en: Cambricon's trillion-yuan cap matters because it is a pricing event — capital markets formally accepting domestic AI silicon as a new asset class. Over the past 18 months, Chinese AI ASIC vendors moved through four stages — production-ready launch, mid-tier customer adoption, frontier-model compatibility, and capital-market endorsement — and Cambricon's trillion-yuan cap closes that final stage. On the same day, Meituan completed LongCat-2.0's training on 50,000 domestic cards, and Huawei Ascend, Hygon, and others all announced fresh enterprise contracts. Crucially, the trillion-yuan figure is not anchored to a single chip SKU but to the whole category of «AI silicon as compute substrate», setting up a multi-year capacity expansion cycle across fabs, equipment and materials.
key_points: 寒武纪市值首破 1 万亿元人民币，科创板首家万亿级算力芯片企业
与同日美团 LongCat-2.0 国产算力训练形成「模型自主 + 芯片自主」双万亿共振
标志国产 AI 算力从产业故事变成市场共识，捕获资本市场万亿定价
晶圆 / 设备 / 材料三层产业链进入 3–5 年扩产周期
key_points_en: Cambricon first to cross 1 trillion yuan ($140B) market cap among STAR Market AI chip stocks
Resonates with same-day domestic-silicon training of Meituan LongCat-2.0 as a «model + chip» dual-trillion event
Marks the transition of domestic AI silicon from industry story to market consensus
Wafer / equipment / materials supply chain enters a 3–5 year capacity expansion cycle

articles.title: 贾扬清离职英伟达，7 亿美元收购仅一年告吹——Lepton 开源承诺成最大裂痕
articles.title_en: Yangqing Jia Departs Nvidia One Year After $700M Acquisition — Broken Open-Source Promise the Decisive Rift
articles.summary: 6 月 29 日，SemiAnalysis 爆料 Lepton AI 创始人、英伟达系统软件副总裁贾扬清已从英伟达离职——距黄仁勋 7 亿美元收购仅一年。报道指出，直接导火索是英伟达搁置了收购时承诺的 2026 年开源 Lepton 核心平台计划；贾扬清已于 6 月 9 日以顾问身份加入去中心化 GPU 算力市场 Hyperbolic Labs。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, SemiAnalysis reported that Yangqing Jia, founder of Lepton AI and Nvidia's VP of system software, has left Nvidia — just one year after Jensen Huang's $700M acquisition. The trigger, per the report, was Nvidia shelving its acquisition-time commitment to open-source Lepton's core platform by 2026. Jia had already joined decentralised GPU marketplace Hyperbolic Labs as an advisor on June 9.
articles.source: SemiAnalysis / 新智元 / 36 氪
articles.content: 这是一场从签字那天就埋下分歧的婚姻。贾扬清职业生涯的核心作品——Caffe、PyTorch、ONNX、search_with_lepton——无一不开源；而英伟达的核心商业模式是销售 GPU 硬件，开源 Lepton 意味着 AMD、国产 GPU 也能接入这套调度器，等同于自毁护城河。收购完成一年来，DGX Lepton 平台被降格为云调度器、原 LeptonAI 独立云一个月内被关停、开源承诺被黄仁勋最终否决。SemiAnalysis 还指出，AMD 工程师 Anush 用 10–12 个 Claude Code Agent 一夜重写了 Slurm 替代品 Spur，每周消耗 65 亿 token——这条独立信号说明：英伟达「花 7 亿买的东西」，开源社区现在用 AI agent 几天就能重建。英伟达想买的从来不是 Lepton 这家小公司，而是整个开源 AI 基础设施社区对贾扬清十年来的信任——这部分恰恰是钱买不来的。
articles.content_en: This was a marriage with cracks visible from the day the deal was signed. Yangqing Jia's signature works — Caffe, PyTorch, ONNX, search_with_lepton — were all open-source. Nvidia's core business is selling GPUs; open-sourcing Lepton would let AMD and Chinese GPU vendors plug into the same scheduler, directly eroding Nvidia's moat. In the year after the deal, DGX Lepton was demoted from a full cloud platform to a GPU-workload scheduler, the original LeptonAI cloud was shut down within a month, and Jensen ultimately vetoed the open-source plan. SemiAnalysis also pointed out that AMD engineer Anush used 10–12 Claude Code agents to rebuild a Slurm alternative called Spur overnight, burning 6.5 billion tokens a week — a separate signal that the open-source community can now reconstruct in days what Nvidia bought for $700M. What Nvidia really wanted to buy was a decade of trust the open-source community had placed in Jia. That, it turns out, is the one thing money cannot acquire.
key_points: Lepton AI 创始人贾扬清确认离英伟达，入职时长仅一年
直接导火索：英伟达搁置 2026 年开源 Lepton 核心平台承诺

贾扬清 6 月 9 日已以顾问身份加入去中心化 GPU 算力市场 Hyperbolic

Trigger: Nvidia shelves its commitment to open-source Lepton's core platform by 2026

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 正式版 7 月中旬上线，首引「峰谷定价」——高峰时段 API 价格翻倍
articles.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Goes GA Mid-July with First-of-Kind «Peak/Off-Peak» Pricing — API Cost Doubles in Working Hours
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日，DeepSeek 官方通知 V4 正式版将于 7 月中旬上线，并同步引入大模型 API 行业首例「峰谷定价」机制：每日 9–12 时和 14–18 时为高峰时段，调用价格为平时段的 2 倍；非高峰时段维持原价。此举被视为大模型从「统一报价」走向「按算力供需弹性定价」的关键拐点。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, DeepSeek announced that V4 GA will launch in mid-July and introduce the LLM API industry's first peak/off-peak pricing scheme: daily 9–12 and 14–18 Beijing time will be peak hours at 2x off-peak rates. Off-peak rates remain unchanged. The move marks a pivotal shift from flat-rate LLM pricing to elastic, supply-driven pricing.
articles.source: 红星资本局 / 第一财经 / DeepSeek 官网
articles.source_en: Red Star Capital / Yicai / DeepSeek Official
articles.content: DeepSeek V4 Pro 百万 tokens 输入（缓存命中）平时 0.025 元、高峰 0.05 元；输入（缓存未命中）平时 3 元、高峰 6 元；输出平时 6 元、高峰 12 元。V4 Flash 价格更低，但峰谷比例相同。开发者反应分化：一部分认为峰谷区间只覆盖 7 小时，可错峰使用；另一部分指出 9-18 点恰好是国内开发者主要工作时间，实时客服 / 办公 Agent 类业务成本将显著上行。从行业意义看，这是把「电力市场的峰谷电价」搬到 token 经济的首次尝试——一旦头部模型跟进，将倒逼开发者把批处理、训练任务调度到夜间，任务编排能力成为新的成本竞争力。
articles.content_en: Pricing per million tokens for V4 Pro: cache-hit input rises from RMB 0.025 to 0.05; cache-miss input from RMB 3 to 6; output from RMB 6 to 12. V4 Flash follows a lower base but the same 2x ratio. Developer reactions split: some praise the 7-hour peak window as manageable; others note 9–18 covers the working day for Chinese teams, materially raising costs for real-time customer-support and office agents. Strategically, this is the first time the «peak/off-peak» electricity-market pricing model has been ported into the token economy. Once frontier API vendors follow, developers will be pushed to schedule batch and training workloads at night, making task scheduling a new competitive cost discipline.
key_points: DeepSeek V4 正式版 7 月中旬上线，引入大模型 API 行业首例峰谷定价
V4 Pro 百万 tokens 输出价：平时 6 元 / 高峰 12 元
行业首次把「峰谷电价模式」复制到 token 经济，预计带动其他模型跟进
key_points_en: DeepSeek V4 GA in mid-July introduces the LLM API industry's first peak/off-peak pricing
Peak window: 9:00–12:00 and 14:00–18:00 Beijing time (7 hours), 2x off-peak rate
V4 Pro output: RMB 6 off-peak / RMB 12 peak per million tokens
First time the «time-of-use» power-market model is ported into token economics

articles.title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Science：60+ 预置技能 + 审核 Agent，杀入科研 AI 工作台
articles.title_en: Anthropic Launches Claude Science: 60+ Built-In Skills with a Dedicated Review Agent for End-to-End Scientific Workflows
articles.summary: 7 月 1 日，Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Science——一款面向科学家的 AI 工作台，把分散的科研工具整合到统一环境，由协调 Agent 调用 60+ 预置技能与连接器，覆盖基因组学、蛋白质组学、结构生物学和化学信息学；独立审核 Agent 实时检查引文与计算，应对模型「捏造引用」的痼疾。这是 Anthropic 冲刺 IPO 前在企业级科研市场最重要的一次产品布局。
articles.summary_en: On July 1, Anthropic officially unveiled Claude Science — an AI workbench for scientists that consolidates fragmented research tools into a single environment. A coordinator agent orchestrates 60+ built-in skills and connectors spanning genomics, proteomics, structural biology and cheminformatics, while a separate review agent checks citations and calculations in real time to combat the chronic «fabricated reference» problem. The release is Anthropic's most strategic enterprise-research bet ahead of its IPO push.
articles.source: Anthropic / 环球市场播报
articles.content: Claude Science 不是新模型，而是一套基于现有 Claude 模型构建的工作流产品。其核心是一个协调 Agent，可调用 60 多个预置技能与连接器，并能根据任务自动生成子 Agent，包括用户自建专业 Agent；独立的审核 Agent 负责对每一条引文和每一项计算做实时核查、标记并自动纠错。这一设计直接回应了 AI 模型在科研场景的最大痛点——「自信地编造引用」。Anthropic 首席执行官在内部信中强调，Claude Science 将与 AWS、Microsoft Foundry、Google Cloud 三大云生态深度耦合，目标客户为头部药企、生物科技初创、CRO 与学术机构。这意味着 Anthropic 把竞争焦点从「通用对话」彻底转向「企业级专业工作流」。
articles.content_en: Claude Science is not a new model but a workflow product layered on top of existing Claude models. At its core is a coordinator agent that can invoke 60+ built-in skills and connectors, spawn task-specific sub-agents (including user-defined specialised agents), while a separate review agent verifies citations and calculations in real time and corrects errors automatically. The design directly targets a chronic LLM weakness in scientific contexts — confidently fabricating references. Anthropic's CEO emphasised in an internal memo that Claude Science will be tightly integrated with AWS, Microsoft Foundry and Google Cloud, with top pharma, biotech startups, CROs and academic institutions as the primary buyers. The launch signals Anthropic's decisive pivot from general chatbot competition to specialised enterprise workflows.
key_points: 面向科学家的 AI 工作台，协调 Agent + 60+ 预置技能与连接器
独立审核 Agent 实时检查引文 / 计算，应对 AI 捏造引用顽疾
覆盖基因组学、蛋白质组学、结构生物学、化学信息学等核心赛道
Anthropic IPO 前最重要的企业级专业产品布局
key_points_en: AI workbench for scientists with a coordinator agent and 60+ built-in skills/connectors
Separate review agent verifies citations and computations in real time to fight LLM hallucinations
Covers genomics, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics
Anthropic's most strategic enterprise product release ahead of its IPO push

articles.title: 百度开源 Unlimited OCR：5 天 GitHub Star 破万，端到端 OCR 基准刷新 SOTA
articles.title_en: Baidu Open-Sources Unlimited OCR: 10K GitHub Stars in 5 Days, Sets New SOTA on End-to-End Document Parsing
articles.summary: 百度近日正式开源端到端 OCR 模型 Unlimited OCR——总参数 3B、推理激活仅 570M，仓库地址 github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR，发布次日即登顶 GitHub Daily Trending 与 HuggingFace 多模态趋势榜，GitHub Star 仅 5 天破 1 万。在 OmniDocBench v1.6 基准上取得 93.92% 综合得分，刷新端到端 OCR SOTA；首创 R-SWA 参考滑动窗口注意力机制，让 KV Cache 保持恒定，可单次前向解析数十页 PDF。
articles.summary_en: Baidu has open-sourced Unlimited OCR — a 3B-parameter end-to-end document model with ~570M active parameters at inference, available at github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR. The repo topped GitHub Daily Trending and the HuggingFace multimodal trends list one day after launch, and crossed 10,000 GitHub stars in 5 days. It hits 93.92% on OmniDocBench v1.6, setting a new end-to-end SOTA, and introduces R-SWA (Reference Sliding Window Attention) — a constant-KV-cache mechanism that lets one forward pass parse dozens of PDF pages.
articles.source: 魔搭 ModelScope / 量子位 / 36 氪
articles.content: Unlimited OCR 的核心突破是 R-SWA（Reference Sliding Window Attention）：模型始终关注全部参考 Token（视觉 + 提示词），输出端只保留最近 128 个历史 Token 参与注意力——KV Cache 因此始终保持恒定长度，无论生成 5000 还是 50000 Token，显存与推理速度都不随输出长度增长。基准上，Unlimited OCR 综合得分相对 DeepSeek OCR 提升 +6.22%，文本编辑距离下降 0.035；推理速度方面，真实文档场景比 DeepSeek OCR 快 12.7%，输出达 6000 tokens 时优势扩大到 35%。技术报告核心作者疑似前 DeepSeek 研究员魏浩然，致谢部分专门提及 DeepSeek OCR 与 PaddleOCR——这条研究路线在开源生态中正式形成完整接力。
articles.content_en: Unlimited OCR's central breakthrough is R-SWA (Reference Sliding Window Attention): the decoder always attends to the full visual + prompt reference tokens, while only the most recent 128 output tokens participate in attention on the generation side. The result is a constant KV cache — whether the model produces 5K or 50K tokens, memory and inference speed do not grow with output length. On benchmarks, Unlimited OCR's overall score is +6.22% higher than DeepSeek OCR, with text edit distance down 0.035. Real-document inference is 12.7% faster than DeepSeek OCR, and at ~6,000 output tokens the speed advantage stretches to 35%. The lead author appears to be former DeepSeek researcher Wei Haoran, and the project explicitly credits DeepSeek OCR and PaddleOCR — the open-source line of work is now picking up a baton in front of the whole community.
key_points: 总参 3B、推理激活仅 570M，仓库 github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR
5 天 GitHub Star 破 1 万，登顶 GitHub Daily Trending 与 HuggingFace 多模态趋势榜
OmniDocBench v1.6 综合得分 93.92%，刷新端到端 OCR SOTA
首创 R-SWA 机制实现恒定 KV Cache，单次前向解析数十页 PDF
key_points_en: 3B total / ~570M active parameters; repo at github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR
10K GitHub stars in 5 days; #1 on GitHub Daily Trending and HuggingFace multimodal trends
