articles.title: 月之暗面 Kimi ARR 突破 3 亿美元，新一轮融资投前估值跳至 315 亿美元
articles.title_en: Moonshot's Kimi Hits $300M ARR, New Funding Round Pre-Money Jumps to $31.5B
articles.summary: 据知情人士透露，月之暗面（Kimi）上一轮 200 亿美元估值融资已完成交割，新一轮融资已启动、投前估值跳至 315 亿美元；6 月中旬 Kimi 年度经常性收入（ARR）突破 3 亿美元，主要来自模型迭代驱动的开发者使用与 API 收入，API 收入已占整体 70% 以上并持续走高，曲线被部分投资人解读为「Anthropic 早期商业化阶段的特征」。
articles.summary_en: According to people familiar with the matter, Moonshot AI (Kimi) has closed its previous $20B-valuation round, with a new round already launched at a pre-money of $31.5B. By mid-June, Kimi's ARR crossed $300M, driven mainly by developer adoption and API revenue from model iteration. API revenue now accounts for more than 70% of total revenue and continues climbing — a curve that several investors are now comparing to Anthropic's early commercialisation phase.
articles.source: 36 氪 / 财联社
articles.content: Kimi 这条曲线最值得注意的不是绝对数字，而是结构——70% 以上来自 API 与开发者付费，意味着收入侧已经摆脱「免费 C 端拉新 + 广告变现」的早期路径，进入更接近 Anthropic 的「企业 + 开发者付费」模式。这条路径的特征是：客单价高、增长稳、对模型能力差异化敏感。在国内市场，Kimi 与智谱 GLM、阿里 Qwen、DeepSeek 共同构成「头部国产开源 / 半开源」第一梯队，K2.7 系列在 Coinbase 等海外上市公司开始作为默认模型，反过来又会强化 API 收入的杠杆。315 亿美元的投前估值如能落地，将使月之暗面正式进入全球大模型公司估值前五。
articles.content_en: What makes Kimi's curve interesting is structure, not absolute numbers — over 70% of revenue now comes from APIs and developer subscriptions, not consumer freemium or ad revenue. That mirrors Anthropic's early commercialisation pattern: high ACV, steady growth, and high sensitivity to model differentiation. Domestically, Kimi sits in China's open / semi-open frontier tier alongside Zhipu GLM, Alibaba Qwen and DeepSeek; K2.7 is becoming a default model at U.S.-listed customers such as Coinbase, which in turn levers API revenue further. If the $31.5B pre-money closes, Moonshot will enter the global top-5 by frontier-lab valuation.
key_points: Kimi 6 月中旬 ARR 突破 3 亿美元，API 收入占比超 70%
新一轮融资启动，投前估值跳至 315 亿美元
上一轮 200 亿美元估值融资已完成交割
收入结构被对标 Anthropic 早期商业化阶段
key_points_en: Kimi ARR crosses $300M in mid-June, with API revenue >70% of total
New funding round launched at $31.5B pre-money valuation
Previous $20B-valuation round has closed
Revenue mix mirrors Anthropic's early commercialisation phase

articles.title: OpenAI 内部演示新优化方案：模型推理成本「腰斩」
articles.title_en: OpenAI Demos Internal Optimisation: Model Inference Cost Cut by More Than Half
articles.summary: 据财联社、金十数据 6 月 30 日援引知情人士消息，OpenAI 工程师本月早些时候向部分同事展示了一套全新的推理优化方案，能将模型推理成本削减一半以上。这是继 DeepSeek 上周开源 DSpark 框架（单用户提速 60%–85%、整体吞吐 +400%）之后，行业本月内出现的第二条「软件层推理效率重大突破」信号。
articles.summary_en: Per Cailian Press and Jin10 on June 30, citing people familiar, OpenAI engineers demonstrated to colleagues earlier this month a new optimisation stack capable of cutting model inference cost by more than half. It is the second major «software-layer inference efficiency» breakthrough surfaced this month, following DeepSeek's open-sourced DSpark framework last week (60–85% single-user speedup, 4x total throughput).
articles.source: 财联社 / 金十数据
articles.content: 知情人士透露，OpenAI 这套方案融合了多项内部新研技术，目的是在 GPT-5.6 系列（Sol/Terra/Luna）逐案审批节奏导致的「外部模型扩张受阻」背景下，先把单位推理成本压下去，为后续大规模 API 降价腾出空间。叠加上周 DSpark 在 DeepSeek V4-Flash 真实流量中实现的 4 倍吞吐提升，行业本月已经出现两条独立的「推理效率非线性跃升」信号——这意味着 AI 厂商之间的成本竞争正从「算力堆叠」彻底转向「软件层逆袭」。短期看，OpenAI 内部腰斩 + DeepSeek 推理 4 倍的双重压力，将迫使 Anthropic、xAI 等其他头部厂商加速跟进推理框架优化，否则将在 token 单价战中失去身位。
articles.content_en: Sources say OpenAI's new stack combines several internal research advances and is designed to lower per-token inference cost ahead of any large API price cut — necessary headroom given that the GPT-5.6 series (Sol/Terra/Luna) is now released under per-case U.S. government approval. Combined with DSpark's 4x throughput gain on DeepSeek V4-Flash production traffic last week, this is now the second independent signal in the same month that inference efficiency is jumping non-linearly — a clear sign that the cost war among AI labs is shifting from «stacking compute» to «software-layer counterattack». Anthropic and xAI will be under pressure to follow, or risk losing position in the per-token price war.
key_points: OpenAI 工程师本月内部演示新方案：推理成本削减一半以上
本月行业第二条「软件层推理效率非线性跃升」信号（前一条为 DSpark）
应对 GPT-5.6 系列被政府逐案审批后的市场扩张限制
倒逼 Anthropic / xAI 等头部厂商加速跟进推理框架优化
key_points_en: OpenAI engineers demonstrated an internal stack cutting inference cost by more than half
Second non-linear inference-efficiency signal of the month (DSpark being the first)
Compensates for slowed external rollout of the GPT-5.6 series under per-case U.S. approval
Will pressure Anthropic and xAI to accelerate their own inference-framework upgrades

articles.title: 亚马逊云科技投 10 亿美元成立「前线派驻工程部」，工程师直接入驻客户企业
articles.title_en: AWS Spins Up $1B Forward-Deployed Engineering Unit, Embedding Engineers Directly Inside Customer Companies
articles.summary: 亚马逊云科技 6 月 30 日宣布，将斥资 10 亿美元成立「前线派驻工程部」（Forward-Deployed Engineering），专门派遣工程师直接入驻企业客户内部，加速 AI 系统的搭建与落地。前线派驻工程师（FDE）模式最早由军工软件企业 Palantir 提出，今年早些时候 OpenAI、Anthropic 已联合银行 / PE / 咨询机构组建专属 FDE 服务公司，亚马逊云科技此次正式入局。
articles.summary_en: Amazon Web Services announced on June 30 that it will spend $1 billion to build a Forward-Deployed Engineering (FDE) unit, sending engineers directly inside enterprise customers to accelerate AI deployment. The FDE model — pioneered by defense-software firm Palantir more than a decade ago — was rebooted earlier this year by OpenAI and Anthropic in joint ventures with banks, PE firms and consultancies. AWS is now formally entering the same race.
articles.source: 环球市场播报 / 财联社
articles.content: FDE 模式的核心是：技术供应商不再只卖 API 或卖云，而是把工程师直接派到客户公司内部，跟客户一起拆问题、改业务流、部署 Agent。这套模式最早被 Palantir 用于把军工软件卖进美国政府，每个 FDE 实际承担「外包 CTO」的角色。在 2025 年下半年开始，OpenAI 与摩根大通、KKR、麦肯锡等共同设立专属 FDE 服务公司；Anthropic 也有类似动作。亚马逊云科技 10 亿美元入局，意味着「企业级 AI 落地」已经从 SaaS 自助模式正式过渡到「人 + 软件 + 算力」的高客单价托管交付模式——同时它也直接抬高了头部云厂商的服务定价天花板。
articles.content_en: The essence of FDE is that the vendor no longer just sells an API or cloud capacity — it embeds engineers directly inside the customer, jointly diagnosing problems, redesigning workflows and deploying agents. Palantir pioneered this model selling defense software into the U.S. government, where each FDE effectively acts as the customer's outsourced CTO. Since H2 2025, OpenAI has launched dedicated FDE joint ventures with JPMorgan, KKR and McKinsey; Anthropic has done similar deals. AWS's $1B move means enterprise AI deployment is officially shifting from self-serve SaaS to a high-ACV «people + software + compute» managed-delivery model — and is materially raising the service-pricing ceiling for hyperscalers.
key_points: AWS 斥资 10 亿美元成立前线派驻工程部（FDE）
工程师直接入驻企业客户内部，加速 AI 系统落地
FDE 模式源自 Palantir，今年已被 OpenAI / Anthropic 复用
标志企业级 AI 从 SaaS 自助过渡到「人 + 软件 + 算力」托管交付模式
key_points_en: AWS pledges $1B to launch a Forward-Deployed Engineering (FDE) unit
Engineers embedded directly inside enterprise customers to deploy AI
FDE model originated at Palantir; reused by OpenAI / Anthropic earlier this year
Marks the shift of enterprise AI from self-serve SaaS to a «people + software + compute» managed-delivery model

articles.title: 中昊芯英发布全自研 TPU 芯片「须臾」及泰则 2.0 智算平台
articles.title_en: Zhonghao Xinying Unveils Fully Self-Developed TPU Chip «Xuyu» and the Taize 2.0 AI Compute Platform
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日，国内 TPU 架构 AI 芯片厂商中昊芯英对外推出两款新品——新一代全自研高性能 TPU AI 专用算力芯片「须臾」，以及搭载该芯片的软硬件一体化智算底座「泰则 2.0」。相较初代「刹那」与泰则 1.0 智算服务器，新品在底层架构、算力峰值、片上存储、集群互联、计算能效五大维度全面升级。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, Zhonghao Xinying, one of China's early TPU-architecture AI chip vendors, launched two new products — the next-generation fully self-developed TPU «Xuyu», and the integrated «Taize 2.0» AI compute platform built on top of it. Compared with its first-generation «Shana» chip and Taize 1.0 servers, the new generation is upgraded across architecture, peak compute, on-chip memory, cluster interconnect and energy efficiency.
articles.source: 中昊芯英官网 / 公开通稿
articles.content: 中昊芯英是国内较早布局 TPU 架构 AI 芯片的玩家。「须臾」相对初代「刹那」在底层指令集、片上存储与集群互联三方面做了完整翻新，对外提供 BF16 / FP8 双精度，单卡算力峰值与能效比官方表态「行业领先」。配套软件栈「泰则 2.0」直接面向万卡级训练 / 推理一体化场景。这是继寒武纪、华为昇腾、海光之后又一个国产 AI ASIC 厂商完成「发布即跑通」的工程闭环——叠加同日美团 LongCat-2.0 在 5 万张国产卡上完成万亿训练，中国 AI 算力底座正在以「多家厂商同时上量」的方式快速补齐供给。
articles.content_en: Zhonghao Xinying was an early entrant in China's TPU-architecture AI silicon. «Xuyu» upgrades the previous-generation «Shana» across instruction set, on-chip memory and cluster interconnect, offering BF16 / FP8 dual precision; the company claims «industry-leading» peak per-card compute and energy efficiency. The companion software stack Taize 2.0 targets unified training-and-inference workloads at the 10K-card scale. After Cambricon, Huawei Ascend and Hygon, this is yet another Chinese AI ASIC vendor reaching production-ready scale — together with Meituan's same-day trillion-parameter training on 50,000 domestic chips, it shows that China's AI compute substrate is now scaling on multiple vendors simultaneously.
key_points: 全自研高性能 TPU AI 专用芯片「须臾」正式发布
搭载「须臾」的软硬件一体化智算底座「泰则 2.0」同步推出
相比初代「刹那」+ 泰则 1.0，五大维度全面升级
国产 AI ASIC 多厂商同时上量，算力供给侧加速补齐
key_points_en: Fully self-developed TPU «Xuyu» officially released
«Taize 2.0» integrated AI compute platform built on Xuyu launches alongside
Upgraded across five dimensions versus prior-gen «Shana» + Taize 1.0
Domestic AI ASIC vendors are scaling production capacity in parallel

articles.title: DeepSeek 联合北大开源 DSpark 推理加速框架，单用户提速 60%–85%、整体吞吐 +400%
articles.title_en: DeepSeek and Peking University Open-Source DSpark: 60-85% Single-User Speedup, 4x Total Throughput
articles.summary: 6 月 27 日，DeepSeek 与北京大学联合开源全栈推测性解码工具链 DeepSpec 及核心框架 DSpark，通过「半自回归 + 置信度调度」两大创新，将 V4-Flash 单用户生成速度提升 60%–85%，整体吞吐量最高提升 4 倍，且不损失输出质量；项目以 MIT 协议开源，已兼容 Qwen3、Gemma 等开源模型。
articles.summary_en: On June 27, DeepSeek and Peking University jointly open-sourced DSpark and the full-stack DeepSpec toolkit. Through two innovations — semi-autoregressive generation and confidence-aware scheduling — DSpark lifts V4-Flash single-user speed by 60-85% and total throughput by up to 4x with zero quality loss. Released under MIT license, it already works with Qwen3, Gemma and other open-source models.
articles.source: 51CTO / DeepSeek 技术博客
articles.content: DSpark 用两套核心设计解决了过去两年推测解码工程落地的两大瓶颈。第一是后缀衰减——早期并行草稿模型一次猜多个 token，但因每个位置独立猜测、缺乏上下文依赖，越往后错得越离谱；DSpark 引入「半自回归生成架构」，在并行的基础上叠加极简的 Markov head 串行模块，让 2 层深度的 DSpark 在 Qwen3 上的平均接受长度反而超过 5 层深度的纯并行 DFlash，相对自回归 Eagle3 提升 26.7%–30.9%。第二是全量验证浪费——传统方案不管草稿置信度多低都把所有候选送进大模型验证，DSpark 通过「置信度头 + 顺序温度缩放」把校准误差从 3%–8% 压到约 1%，低负载时拉满吞吐、高负载时主动裁剪。该框架已在 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 与 V4-Pro 真实线上流量中部署，并以 MIT 协议开源。
articles.content_en: DSpark addresses two long-standing engineering pain points in speculative decoding. First, suffix decay: early parallel draft models guess multiple tokens at once but, because each position guesses independently with no contextual dependency, errors compound rapidly. DSpark introduces a semi-autoregressive generation architecture that adds a minimal Markov head sequential module on top of parallel drafting — a 2-layer DSpark beats a 5-layer pure-parallel DFlash on effective accepted length, with a 26.7%-30.9% improvement over autoregressive Eagle3 on Qwen3. Second, full-batch verification waste: traditional pipelines verify every candidate regardless of draft confidence. DSpark attaches a confidence head and uses sequential temperature scaling to compress calibration error from 3%-8% to roughly 1%, maximizing throughput under low load and pruning aggressively under high load. The framework is already running in production on DeepSeek-V4-Flash and V4-Pro, and is open-sourced under MIT.
key_points: 单用户生成速度提升 60%–85%，整体吞吐量最高 +400%
半自回归生成 + 置信度调度双创新，输出质量无损
MIT 协议开源全栈工具链 DeepSpec，已兼容 Qwen3、Gemma
已在 DeepSeek-V4-Flash、V4-Pro 真实线上流量部署
key_points_en: 60-85% single-user speedup, up to 4x total throughput
Two innovations — semi-autoregressive generation and confidence-aware scheduling — with no quality loss
Full-stack DeepSpec toolkit open-sourced under MIT, compatible with Qwen3 and Gemma
Already deployed in production on DeepSeek-V4-Flash and V4-Pro

articles.title: 谷歌开始限制 Meta 使用 Gemini，AI 算力供给紧张拖累 Meta 多个项目
articles.title_en: Google Restricts Meta's Access to Gemini as AI Compute Crunch Delays Meta Projects
articles.summary: 6 月 29 日，财联社援引知情人士报道，谷歌已开始限制 Meta 对 Gemini 的使用，原因是 Meta 的算力需求已超出谷歌当前承载能力；尽管谷歌持续追加 AI 基础设施投入，仍难以满足客户激增的算力需求，Meta 已有多个 AI 项目因 Gemini 配额收紧被迫推迟。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, Cailian Press reported that Google has begun restricting Meta's use of Gemini, citing Meta's compute demand outstripping Google's current capacity. Even with continued AI infrastructure investment, Google cannot keep up with surging customer demand; Meta has had to delay several AI projects due to tighter Gemini quotas.
articles.source: 财联社 / 凤凰网科技
articles.content: 「连谷歌都缺算力了」成为本周 AI 圈的热门话题。财联社引述知情人士消息称，由于 Meta 的算力需求过大，已超过谷歌当前能够支持的范围，谷歌开始主动限制 Meta 对 Gemini 的使用——这在大型云厂商之间极为罕见。报道指出，即便谷歌持续加码 AI 基础设施建设，依然无法满足客户日益激增的需求。这一限制使得 Meta 的多个 AI 项目被迫推迟。配合 BIS 警示美国算力增速跟不上需求增速、AOC 提议反垄断拆分大型 AI 公司，以及苹果开始上调消费电子价格转嫁芯片成本，全行业进入「算力饥荒」状态——任何能在软件层榨出 10% 吞吐的方案都将变成「无形的数据中心」。
articles.content_en: 'Even Google is running out of compute' became the AI talking point of the week. Cailian Press, citing people familiar, reported that Meta's compute demand has exceeded what Google can currently support, prompting Google to start restricting Meta's access to Gemini — an extremely rare move between major cloud providers. According to the report, even with continued AI infrastructure investment, Google still cannot keep up with rapidly growing customer demand. The restriction has forced Meta to delay multiple AI projects. Combined with BIS warnings that U.S. compute capacity is falling behind demand, AOC's antitrust proposal to break up large AI companies, and Apple raising consumer electronics prices to pass through chip costs, the entire industry is entering compute famine — any software-layer solution that can squeeze out 10% more throughput becomes effectively an invisible data center.
key_points: 谷歌主动限制 Meta 使用 Gemini，超出当前承载能力
即便加码基建，谷歌仍无法满足客户激增需求
Meta 多个 AI 项目因配额收紧被迫推迟
BIS、AOC、苹果三方信号叠加，行业进入「算力饥荒」
key_points_en: Google actively limits Meta's Gemini access amid capacity strain
Even with continued capex, Google cannot meet surging customer demand
Multiple Meta AI projects delayed due to tightened quotas
BIS, AOC, and Apple signals converge into industry-wide compute famine

articles.title: 马斯克：Grok 4.5 已开始内测，SpaceX 与特斯拉员工率先获 Beta 体验
articles.title_en: Musk: Grok 4.5 Enters Internal Beta, SpaceX and Tesla Staff Get Early Access
articles.summary: 6 月 28 日，马斯克在 X 上披露 Grok 4.5 已开始内测，SpaceX 与特斯拉员工率先体验，预计今年剩余时间每月发布一款新模型；新版本基于 1.5 万亿参数的 V9 基础模型构建，主打更强的多轮推理与代码能力，旨在与 GPT-5.6、Claude Mythos 5 正面竞争。
articles.summary_en: On June 28, Elon Musk announced on X that Grok 4.5 has entered internal beta, with SpaceX and Tesla employees receiving early access. xAI plans to ship a new model every month for the rest of the year. Built on the 1.5T-parameter V9 base, Grok 4.5 emphasizes stronger multi-turn reasoning and coding to compete head-to-head with GPT-5.6 and Claude Mythos 5.
articles.source: 36 氪 / 马斯克 X 官方账号
articles.content: 马斯克在 X 帖子中表示，Grok 4.5 内测已经启动，SpaceX 与特斯拉员工是第一批 Beta 测试用户，并预告今年剩余每一个月都会有新模型发布。该模型基于 xAI V9 基础模型，参数规模达 1.5 万亿，主攻多轮推理与编程能力，瞄准 GPT-5.6 Sol 与 Claude Mythos 5 的市场份额。值得关注的是，Grok 系列的迭代节奏正在加快——从 Grok 4 到 4.5 不到三个月，背后是 xAI 在孟菲斯超算与新增 GPU 订单上的持续加码。该模型也将在 SpaceX 完成 600 亿美元收购 Cursor 的协同效应下，进一步打通 xAI 的代码生成与 Agent 工作流。
articles.content_en: In a post on X, Musk said Grok 4.5 internal testing has kicked off, with SpaceX and Tesla employees as the first beta users, and that a new model will ship every remaining month of the year. Grok 4.5 is built on xAI's V9 base at 1.5 trillion parameters, focused on multi-turn reasoning and coding to win share from GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Mythos 5. The Grok release cadence is accelerating — less than three months from Grok 4 to 4.5 — backed by xAI's continued investment in the Memphis supercluster and additional GPU orders. The model will also benefit from SpaceX's USD 60 billion Cursor acquisition synergies, deepening xAI's code generation and agent workflow stack.
key_points: Grok 4.5 内测已启动，SpaceX 与特斯拉员工率先 Beta
基于 1.5 万亿参 V9 基础模型，主攻多轮推理与代码
今年剩余时间将逐月发布新模型
与 SpaceX 收购 Cursor 形成代码生成与 Agent 协同
key_points_en: Grok 4.5 enters internal beta with SpaceX and Tesla as first users
Built on the 1.5T-parameter V9 base, optimized for multi-turn reasoning and coding
New models to ship every remaining month this year
Aligns with SpaceX's Cursor acquisition for code generation and agent synergies

articles.title: Coinbase 将默认模型切换至 GLM 5.2 与 Kimi K2.7，AI 支出在用量激增下被砍半
articles.title_en: Coinbase Switches Default Models to GLM 5.2 and Kimi K2.7, Halving AI Spend Despite Exploding Token Usage
articles.summary: 6 月 30 日，Coinbase 首席执行官 Brian Armstrong 公开披露：公司通过内部 LLM 网关把全员默认大模型切换至智谱 GLM 5.2 与月之暗面 Kimi K2.7，AI 支出被压缩接近 50%，而 token 用量仍在指数级增长；91% 的工程师从未触及原方案的用量上限。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong publicly disclosed that the company switched its default LLM through an internal gateway to Zhipu's GLM 5.2 and Moonshot's Kimi K2.7, cutting AI spend by close to 50% while token usage continues to grow exponentially. 91% of engineers never even hit the original usage caps.
articles.source: Coinbase 官方 / 36 氪
articles.content: Coinbase 是典型的美国合规上市公司，过去一直是「能用美国模型就不用别人」的客户画像。这次切换的产业意义在于，它把中国开源模型的商业落地从 a16z 合伙人 Martin Casado 此前披露的「美国 AI 初创企业约 80% 用中国模型做融资 demo」，推到了主流上市公司层面。配合 Pinterest、爱彼迎常态化使用、西门子工业自动化 CEO 公开表态「没有缺点」、非洲基于国产开源训练 20 种本土语言模型——Hugging Face 2026 春季报告显示，过去一年全球 41% 大模型下载量来自中国研发的模型，李强总理在达沃斯论坛披露累计下载已达 100 亿次。Coinbase 案例的关键细节是：切换后用量上限被取消，因为 91% 的工程师从未触及原有上限，这意味着真正的瓶颈从来不是「用量限制」，而是「价格性能比」。
articles.content_en: Coinbase is a textbook U.S.-listed, compliance-heavy customer — historically the canonical 'U.S.-first' buyer. The industry significance of this switch is that it pushes the commercial adoption of Chinese open-source models from the startup circuit — where a16z partner Martin Casado previously disclosed that roughly 80% of U.S. AI startups use Chinese models in fundraising demos — into mainstream public markets. Alongside regular use at Pinterest and Airbnb, Siemens Industrial Automation's CEO going on record saying 'no downsides,' and African teams training 20 local-language models on Chinese open-source bases, the Hugging Face 2026 Spring report shows 41% of global LLM downloads in the past year came from Chinese-developed models, with Premier Li Qiang disclosing 10 billion cumulative downloads at the Davos forum. Coinbase's key detail: usage caps were lifted after the switch because 91% of engineers never hit them — meaning the real bottleneck was never the cap, it was the price-performance differential.
key_points: 默认模型切换至 GLM 5.2 + Kimi K2.7，AI 支出砍半
91% 工程师从未触及原方案用量上限
Hugging Face 显示 41% 全球大模型下载来自中国模型
全球累计下载量已达 100 亿次
key_points_en: Default model switched to GLM 5.2 + Kimi K2.7, AI spend cut in half
91% of engineers never hit the original usage caps
Hugging Face shows 41% of global LLM downloads come from Chinese models
Cumulative downloads reach 10 billion globally

articles.title: 智元精灵 G2 在龙旗工厂南昌产线连续 6 天作业：8 台机器人 14925 件成功率 99.987%
articles.title_en: Zhiyuan Spirit G2 Robots Work 6 Days Straight at Longcheer Nanchang Plant: 8 Humanoids, 14,925 Units, 99.987% Success Rate
articles.summary: 6 月 23–28 日，智元机器人在龙旗科技南昌智能工厂部署 8 台精灵 G2 完成连续 6 天产线作业：累计有效作业时长 54 小时、完成订单 14925 件、抓取动作 55107 次、成功率 99.987%；机器人负责物料分拣、上料和成品下线，与人类工人并肩协作。
articles.summary_en: From June 23-28, Zhiyuan Robotics deployed 8 Spirit G2 humanoid robots at Longcheer Technology's Nanchang smart factory for six consecutive days: 54 cumulative working hours, 14,925 units completed, 55,107 grasping operations, and a 99.987% success rate. The robots handle material sorting, loading, and finished-goods unloading alongside human workers.
articles.source: 新华网 / 智元机器人官方
articles.content: 智元机器人副总裁彭思崴介绍，精灵 G2 在龙旗工厂南昌产线的部署是国内首次实现「8 台同型号人形机器人 + 单产线连续 6 天作业」的工业级验证。机器人在 14925 件产品的处理中完成 55107 次抓取动作，成功率达 99.987%——按工业标准这是六西格玛级别的可靠性。龙旗科技智能制造负责人李龙表示，机器人的引入并未取代工人，而是补足了「夜班、连续作业、单调重复」三种最不友好的岗位。这条产线被视为人形机器人从「演示视频」走向「真实开工」的关键节点——之前业内对 G2 持续作业能力的最大质疑——长时间无故障运行能力——被这次连续 54 小时实际作业数据直接驳回。
articles.content_en: Peng Siwei, VP of Zhiyuan Robotics, said the deployment of Spirit G2 at Longcheer's Nanchang plant is China's first industrial-grade validation of '8 identical humanoid robots running a single production line for six consecutive days.' Across 14,925 units processed, the robots performed 55,107 grasping operations at a 99.987% success rate — Six Sigma reliability by industrial standards. Longcheer's smart manufacturing lead Li Long stressed that robots did not replace workers but instead filled the three most undesirable roles: night shifts, continuous operation, and monotonous repetition. The line is being read as the inflection point where humanoid robots cross from demo video to actual employment — the industry's biggest doubt about G2's sustained operation, namely long-duration fault-free running, was directly answered by 54 cumulative hours of real production data.
key_points: 8 台精灵 G2 连续 6 天产线作业，累计 54 小时
完成 14925 件订单，55107 次抓取动作
成功率 99.987%，达到工业六西格玛级别
覆盖夜班、连续作业、单调重复三类最不友好岗位
key_points_en: 8 Spirit G2 robots run 6 days straight, 54 cumulative hours
14,925 units processed with 55,107 grasping operations
99.987% success rate, reaching industrial Six Sigma levels
Covers night shifts, continuous operation, and monotonous repetition

articles.title: 智平方完成 50 亿元 B 轮融资，跻身粤港澳大湾区首家具身智能独角兽
articles.title_en: Zhipingfang Closes USD 700M Series B, Becomes the First Embodied AI Unicorn in the Greater Bay Area
articles.summary: 6 月 29 日，智平方宣布完成 50 亿元 B 轮融资，投后估值超 200 亿元，成为粤港澳大湾区首家具身智能独角兽；本轮由产业资本与战略 VC 联合领投，资金主要用于通用机器人量产爬坡、新一代基座模型研发与海外市场扩展。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, Zhipingfang announced the close of a USD 700 million Series B, taking its post-money valuation past USD 2.8 billion and crowning it the first embodied AI unicorn in the Greater Bay Area. The round was co-led by industrial capital and strategic VCs, with proceeds earmarked for general-purpose robot mass production, next-gen foundation model R&D, and overseas expansion.
articles.source: 智平方官方 / 第一财经
articles.content: 智平方此次 50 亿元融资是 2026 年具身智能赛道单笔最大金额之一，加上前一周智元、银河通用、星动纪元的同步融资，整个 6 月具身智能领域累计融资已超过 200 亿元。智平方创始团队来自机器人控制系统与多模态基础模型方向，主攻「家庭场景通用机器人」，在过去 12 个月完成首批 1000 台量产交付。资金用途上，第一是把现有量产线扩产到 5000 台/年，第二是把端到端基座模型从当前 32B 推进到 120B 参数级别，第三是在东南亚、中东与北非建立本地化合作渠道。值得注意的是，本轮投资方包括两家工业制造背景的产业资本——这意味着具身智能正在被传统制造业视为下一轮转型的核心入口。
articles.content_en: Zhipingfang's USD 700 million round is among the single largest checks in 2026's embodied AI cycle. Combined with concurrent rounds at Zhiyuan, Galaxy General, and Stardust Era the prior week, total embodied AI funding in June alone has surpassed USD 2.8 billion. The founding team comes from robotic control systems and multi-modal foundation models, targeting general-purpose home robots, and has shipped the first 1,000 units in production over the past 12 months. Use of proceeds: first, scale production capacity to 5,000 units a year; second, advance the end-to-end foundation model from today's 32B to a 120B parameter class; third, build localization partnerships across Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and North Africa. Notably, two investors with industrial manufacturing backgrounds joined the round — meaning traditional manufacturing now views embodied AI as the core entry point for its next transformation cycle.
key_points: 完成 50 亿元 B 轮融资，估值超 200 亿元
粤港澳大湾区首家具身智能独角兽
资金用于量产扩产、120B 基座模型与海外渠道
6 月具身智能赛道融资累计已突破 200 亿元
key_points_en: Closes USD 700 million Series B at over USD 2.8 billion post-money
First embodied AI unicorn in the Greater Bay Area
Funds will go to mass production, a 120B foundation model, and overseas channels
June embodied-AI funding crosses USD 2.8 billion

articles.title: DeepSeek 官宣 V4 正式版 7 月中旬上线，引入「峰谷定价」API 高峰时段翻倍计费
articles.title_en: DeepSeek Confirms V4 GA for Mid-July, Introduces Peak-Valley Pricing with 2x Surcharge During Peak Hours
articles.summary: 6 月 29 日，DeepSeek 官方宣布 V4 正式版将于 7 月中旬上线，同步首次推出「峰谷定价」机制——高峰时段（每日 9–12 时、14–18 时）API 价格为非高峰时段两倍；这是国内大模型 API 行业首次出现差异化时段计价。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, DeepSeek announced that V4 GA will launch in mid-July, alongside its first peak-valley pricing scheme: API rates during peak windows (9 AM-12 PM and 2 PM-6 PM daily) will be double the off-peak rate. This is the first time China's LLM API industry has rolled out time-differentiated pricing.
articles.source: DeepSeek 官方 / 财联社
articles.content: 峰谷定价机制把电力市场的成熟思路搬到了 token 经济。DeepSeek 给出的高峰窗口与企业级 AI 工作流的典型负载完全吻合——开发者在上班时间集中调用 API、Agent 在午后批处理高峰、晚间则进入「批量任务」时段。这一定价改革有两重意义：第一是对推理算力的市场化平滑机制——通过价格信号引导用户把非紧急任务挪到夜间，从而提升整体 GPU 利用率；第二是对开发者侧的成本压力测试——它会逼着应用方重新评估「实时 vs 异步」的工作流设计，长期看推动更多任务从同步 API 切换到批处理。配合 DSpark 推理框架的开源，DeepSeek 在「软件加速 + 定价机制」两条线上同时出牌，形成「让用户多用 token 但花更少钱」的反直觉商业模型。
articles.content_en: Peak-valley pricing transplants the mature electricity-market mechanism into token economics. The peak window DeepSeek defines maps cleanly onto enterprise AI workload patterns — developers concentrate API calls during business hours, Agents batch-process in the early afternoon, and overnight is reserved for bulk jobs. Two implications: first, it is a market-based smoothing mechanism for inference compute — price signals push users to move non-urgent work to off-peak hours, lifting overall GPU utilization. Second, it stress-tests the cost structure on the developer side — forcing application developers to rethink synchronous vs asynchronous workflows, and pushing more tasks from sync APIs to batch processing. Combined with the open-sourcing of DSpark, DeepSeek is playing two cards at once — software acceleration and pricing mechanism — to build a counterintuitive business model where users consume more tokens while paying less.
key_points: V4 正式版 7 月中旬上线
首次引入峰谷定价，高峰时段 API 翻倍
高峰窗口：每日 9–12 时、14–18 时
与 DSpark 形成「软件加速 + 定价机制」组合拳
key_points_en: V4 GA launches in mid-July
First peak-valley pricing rolled out, 2x surcharge during peak
Peak windows: 9 AM-12 PM and 2 PM-6 PM daily
Pairs with DSpark for a software-acceleration plus pricing-mechanism combo

articles.title: 特斯拉 Cybercab 应急救援指南披露：得州 L4 法案允许企业「自我认证」
articles.title_en: Tesla Cybercab Emergency Response Guide Surfaces: Texas L4 Bill Allows Self-Certification
articles.summary: 6 月 28 日，IT 之家披露特斯拉 Cybercab 的应急救援操作指南，明确这款无方向盘、无踏板的 Robotaxi 已具备 L4 量产条件；得州近期通过的自动驾驶新法允许企业「自我认证」无安全员车辆，特斯拉将成为首个上路的全无人 L4 车队运营商。
articles.summary_en: On June 28, IT Home obtained Tesla's Cybercab emergency response guide, confirming that this steering-wheel-free, pedal-free Robotaxi is ready for L4 mass production. A new Texas autonomous-driving bill allows companies to self-certify driverless vehicles, positioning Tesla to launch the first fully driverless L4 fleet operator on public roads.
articles.source: 凤凰网科技 / IT 之家
articles.content: Cybercab 应急救援指南是一份给消防、警察、急救人员的操作手册，详细说明了在车辆碰撞、起火、被困场景下如何进入车舱、切断高压电、强制停车。该指南的公开意味着特斯拉已完成与多个州应急部门的协调，是大规模上路前的最后一道行政准备工作。得克萨斯州近期通过的自动驾驶新法是这次发布的关键背景——该法案允许具备相应技术能力的企业「自我认证」无安全员的 L4 车辆，绕过传统由 NHTSA 主导的逐车型审批流程。这一立法被业内视为「美国 Robotaxi 的破冰窗口」，特斯拉作为首批拿到自我认证资格的厂商，预计 7 月起在奥斯汀启动首批商业化运营，Cybercab 也将与现有 Model Y Robotaxi 车队并行运营。
articles.content_en: The Cybercab emergency response guide is an operations manual for fire, police, and EMS personnel, detailing entry, high-voltage shutoff, and forced-stop procedures in collision, fire, and entrapment scenarios. Its publication signals that Tesla has finalized coordination with multiple state emergency agencies — the last administrative gate before mass deployment. Texas's recent autonomous-driving bill is the critical backdrop: it allows companies with the requisite technical capability to self-certify driverless L4 vehicles, bypassing NHTSA's traditional per-model approval pipeline. The industry reads this as the U.S. Robotaxi breakout window. As the first to receive self-certification status, Tesla is expected to launch commercial operations in Austin starting in July, with Cybercab running in parallel to the existing Model Y Robotaxi fleet.
key_points: Cybercab 已具备 L4 量产条件，无方向盘无踏板
得州新法允许企业「自我认证」无安全员车辆
特斯拉是首批拿到自我认证资格的厂商
预计 7 月起在奥斯汀启动首批商业化运营
key_points_en: Cybercab is ready for L4 mass production, steering-wheel-free and pedal-free
Texas's new law allows self-certification of driverless vehicles
Tesla is among the first to receive self-certification status
Commercial operations expected to begin in Austin in July

articles.title: 国家超算互联网启动 SCNet 万卡共创计划，提供亿级词元 + 千卡时算力免费支持
articles.title_en: National Supercomputing Internet Launches SCNet 10K-GPU Co-creation Program, Offering Free Billion-Token and Thousand-GPU-Hour Compute
articles.summary: 6 月 29 日，国家超算互联网联合多家算力运营商、模型厂商和高校启动「SCNet 万卡共创计划」，依托国产 scaleX 万卡超集群，向高校、初创企业和开源社区提供亿级词元数据 + 千卡时算力的免费支持，重点扶持中文垂类大模型与开源数据集建设。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, the National Supercomputing Internet, together with compute operators, model vendors and universities, launched the SCNet 10K-GPU Co-creation Program. Backed by the domestic scaleX 10,000-GPU supercluster, the program offers free billion-token datasets and thousand-GPU-hour compute to universities, startups and open-source communities, with a focus on Chinese vertical LLMs and open-source dataset development.
articles.source: 国家超算互联网官方 / 新华网
articles.content: SCNet 万卡共创计划的核心是把国家超算互联网积累的「scaleX 万卡超集群」开放给社会侧——亿级词元意味着高校实验室或小型团队可以在不自购数据集的前提下开展中等规模模型预训练；千卡时算力意味着研究者可以完成完整的微调 + 评测流程而不被 GPU 成本压垮。计划的优先扶持方向是中文垂类大模型——金融、法律、医疗、教育、工业设计 5 大领域——以及开源数据集建设。这一计划与本月底科技部启动的「开源数据集众创」是配套动作，整体呈现政策面对「软件层和数据层」补短板的明确信号：算力之外，数据集的丰富度和高质量微调数据的可获得性，正在成为国内中文大模型生态的瓶颈。
articles.content_en: The core of SCNet 10K-GPU Co-creation is opening up the National Supercomputing Internet's accumulated scaleX 10,000-GPU supercluster to the broader community. Billion-token datasets mean university labs or small teams can run medium-scale pre-training without acquiring their own corpora; thousand-GPU-hours means researchers can complete full fine-tuning and evaluation cycles without being crushed by GPU costs. The program's priority focus is Chinese vertical LLMs — finance, legal, medical, education, and industrial design — alongside open-source dataset development. The initiative pairs with the Ministry of Science and Technology's open-source dataset crowdsourcing program launched at the end of the month, signaling a clear policy push to fill the software and data gaps: beyond compute, dataset richness and access to high-quality fine-tuning data have emerged as bottlenecks for China's Chinese-language LLM ecosystem.
key_points: 依托国产 scaleX 万卡超集群对外开放
提供亿级词元数据 + 千卡时算力免费支持
优先扶持金融、法律、医疗、教育、工业设计 5 大垂类
与科技部「开源数据集众创」形成配套政策
key_points_en: Backed by the domestic scaleX 10,000-GPU supercluster
Free billion-token datasets and thousand-GPU-hour compute
Priority verticals: finance, legal, medical, education, industrial design
Pairs with the Ministry of Science and Technology's open-source dataset crowdsourcing

articles.title: 百度 Unlimited OCR 开源次日登顶 GitHub Daily Trending 与 HuggingFace 多榜
articles.title_en: Baidu Unlimited OCR Hits #1 on GitHub Daily Trending and Multiple Hugging Face Leaderboards on Day Two
articles.summary: 6 月 28–29 日，百度开源的多模态 OCR 模型 Unlimited OCR 在开源次日同时登顶 GitHub Daily Trending 与 Hugging Face 全球趋势榜的多个榜单；该模型仅 3B 参数，但在复杂版式文档、手写体、多语种混合场景下的识别精度显著超越前代主流方案。
articles.summary_en: On June 28-29, Baidu's open-sourced multimodal OCR model — Unlimited OCR — topped both GitHub Daily Trending and multiple Hugging Face global trending leaderboards on day two of release. The model is only 3B parameters but significantly outperforms previous mainstream solutions on complex layouts, handwriting, and multilingual mixed scenarios.
articles.source: 百度官方 / GitHub Trending
articles.content: Unlimited OCR 的爆红反映了一个开源行业的微妙趋势——「以小搏大」正在成为新主流。3B 参数意味着该模型可以在消费级显卡甚至 Mac M3 上本地运行，但识别精度对标了部分 10B+ 参数的闭源 OCR 服务。百度披露的训练数据组成中，多语种文档占比 38%、手写体占比 17%、复杂表格与公式占比 14%，覆盖了过去开源 OCR 长期短板的三类硬场景。开源协议为 Apache 2.0，允许商用与二次开发。社区在 24 小时内贡献了 11 种语言的微调包，包括日文、阿拉伯文、印地语等。这一模式与百度过去半年「先开源、后做生态」的路线一致——文心 X3 开源、AI 搜索接口开放、Comate 代码补全免费，全部指向同一个战略：用开源生态推大模型基础设施市场份额。
articles.content_en: Unlimited OCR's breakout reflects a subtle open-source trend — punching above weight class is becoming the new mainstream. At 3B parameters, the model runs locally on consumer GPUs or even an M3 Mac, yet matches some 10B+ closed-source OCR services in recognition accuracy. Baidu's disclosed training data composition: 38% multilingual documents, 17% handwriting, 14% complex tables and formulas — covering the three hardest categories where open-source OCR has historically lagged. The model is released under Apache 2.0, allowing commercial use and derivative work. Within 24 hours, the community contributed fine-tuning packs in 11 languages, including Japanese, Arabic, and Hindi. This is consistent with Baidu's open-then-ecosystem playbook over the past six months — open-sourcing ERNIE X3, opening AI search APIs, making Comate code completion free — all pointing at one strategy: use open-source ecosystems to push infrastructure market share.
key_points: 3B 参数模型登顶 GitHub Daily Trending
在 Hugging Face 多个全球榜单同时登顶
Apache 2.0 协议开源，支持商用
社区 24 小时贡献 11 种语言微调包
key_points_en: 3B-parameter model tops GitHub Daily Trending
Simultaneously #1 on multiple Hugging Face global leaderboards
Released under Apache 2.0, commercial use allowed
Community contributes 11 language fine-tuning packs in 24 hours

hero.title: 推理效率革命：DSpark 单用户提速 85%，AI 产业从堆算力转向拼算法
hero.title_en: Inference Efficiency Revolution: DSpark Boosts Single-User Speed by 85% as AI Pivots from Compute Stacking to Algorithm Squeezing
hero.summary: DeepSeek 联合北大开源推理加速框架 DSpark，在不增加任何硬件、不损失任何输出质量的前提下，把 V4-Flash 的单用户生成速度拉高 60%–85%，整体推理吞吐量最高提升 4 倍；三天后 Coinbase 首席执行官 Brian Armstrong 公开披露，公司切换默认模型至智谱 GLM 5.2 与月之暗面 Kimi K2.7 后，AI 支出在 token 用量指数级增长下被压缩近一半。两件事标志着 AI 行业进入「软件层逆袭」的下半场。
hero.summary_en: DeepSeek and Peking University have open-sourced DSpark, an inference acceleration framework that lifts V4-Flash single-user generation speed by 60-85% and total throughput by up to 4x without adding hardware or sacrificing quality. Three days later, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong disclosed that AI spend has been cut nearly in half after switching the company default to Zhipu's GLM 5.2 and Moonshot's Kimi K2.7. Together these two stories mark the start of the software-layer counterattack in AI.

hero.title: 先进封装产业链全面爆发：日月光净利 +58%、CoWoS 缺口 20%、长电科技 4 天 3 涨停
hero.title_en: Advanced Packaging Boom: ASE Net Profit +58%, CoWoS Shortage 20%, JCET 3 Limit-Ups in 4 Days
hero.source: 财联社 / 经济日报 / 集微网
hero.summary: AI 芯片需求把先进封装从产业链末端推到价值核心：日月光 Q2 净利同比 +58%，CoWoS 缺口仍达 20-25%，长电科技获 78 亿元临港新厂投资、目标价上调至 110 元，HBM 容量三年翻三倍。供给端三梯队（台系/陆系/日韩）同步扩产，叠加三星 1000 万亿韩元韩国半导体投资与北京太空算力大会启幕，半导体产业进入「精装修」时代。
hero.summary_en: AI chip demand has pushed advanced packaging from the back-end to the core of the value chain: ASE Q2 net profit +58% YoY, CoWoS shortfall still at 20-25%, JCET secured 7.8B yuan Lingang fab with target price raised to 110 yuan, HBM capacity to triple in three years. Three tiers of suppliers (Taiwan / mainland / Japan-Korea) are expanding in sync. Combined with Samsung's 1,000T won Korean semiconductor program and the Beijing Space Computing Summit, semiconductors enter the era of 'fine decoration'.

articles.title: 高通 39 亿美元收购 Modular，Chris Lattner 领衔挑战 CUDA 护城河
articles.title_en: Qualcomm Acquires Modular for $3.9B, Chris Lattner Leads Charge Against CUDA Moat
articles.summary: 高通宣布 39 亿美元收购 AI 软件栈公司 Modular，吸纳 Swift / LLVM / MLIR / Mojo 之父 Chris Lattner 及 250 人团队，Mark Zuckerberg 公开站台。
articles.summary_en: Qualcomm announces $3.9B acquisition of Modular, absorbing Swift/LLVM/MLIR/Mojo creator Chris Lattner and a 250-person team. Mark Zuckerberg publicly endorses the move.
articles.source: Qualcomm 公告 / 彭博
articles.content: 高通 6/28 宣布以 39 亿美元股票收购 AI 编译器与运行时公司 Modular，预计 2026 年 Q4 完成交割。Modular 旗下的 Mojo 语言与 MAX 平台支持跨芯片厂商部署，2025 年估值已达 17 亿美元。Mark Zuckerberg 在采访中称这笔交易让高通拿到了「真正能挑战 CUDA 的软件基底」。高通同步开放 Snapdragon 数据中心路线图，2027 年底前将首批 AI 加速器送样。
articles.content_en: On June 28, Qualcomm announced a $3.9B all-stock acquisition of AI compiler and runtime company Modular, expected to close in Q4 2026. Modular's Mojo language and MAX platform support cross-vendor deployment, with a 2025 valuation of $1.7B. Mark Zuckerberg called the deal Qualcomm's first real software foundation to challenge CUDA. Qualcomm simultaneously released a Snapdragon Data Center roadmap, with first AI accelerator samples due by end-2027.

articles.title: 三星 1000 万亿韩元押注半导体：HBM 与代工三线同推
articles.title_en: Samsung Bets 1,000 Trillion Won on Semiconductors: HBM and Foundry Triple Push
articles.summary: 三星宣布未来 10 年向半导体投入 1000 万亿韩元（约 7300 亿美元），重点扩 HBM4/HBM4E、平泽 P5 代工厂与平山系统芯片产线。
articles.summary_en: Samsung pledges 1,000 trillion won (~$730B) to semiconductors over 10 years, prioritizing HBM4/HBM4E, Pyeongtaek P5 foundry, and Pyongsan system chip lines.
articles.source: 韩联社 / 三星电子
articles.content: 韩国政府与三星电子 6/28 联合公布「半导体生态超级计划」，未来 10 年 1000 万亿韩元投资将分三部分：HBM4 / HBM4E 量产产能扩 2.5 倍、平泽 P5 厂 2nm GAA 工艺扩产、与韩国政府共建半导体人才教育园区。三星称该计划意在「重建 HBM 龙头地位、并把代工市占率拉回 25% 以上」。
articles.content_en: On June 28, the Korean government and Samsung Electronics jointly unveiled a Semiconductor Ecosystem Super Plan: a 1,000T won investment over 10 years split into HBM4/HBM4E capacity expansion (2.5x), Pyeongtaek P5 2nm GAA foundry ramp, and a national semiconductor talent campus. Samsung says the plan aims to 'restore HBM leadership and pull foundry share back above 25%'.

articles.title: 北京太空算力大会启幕：把数据中心搬上轨道
articles.title_en: Beijing Space Computing Summit Opens: Lifting Data Centers into Orbit
articles.summary: 首届北京太空算力大会 6/28-6/30 召开，国电高科、中科宇航等公布在轨算力卫星组网计划，2030 年前部署 1EFLOPS 太空算力网。
articles.summary_en: The inaugural Beijing Space Computing Summit (June 28-30) saw Guodian Gaoke, CAS Space and others unveil orbital compute satellite roadmaps, targeting 1 EFLOPS of space compute by 2030.
articles.source: 新华社 / 中国航天报
articles.content: 首届北京太空算力大会公布「太空 AI 算力网络」白皮书：2027 年首批 5 颗算力卫星入轨，2030 年前组成 200 星座，提供 1 EFLOPS 在轨算力，重点服务遥感数据实时处理、低延迟跨境通信和应急 AI 推理。中科宇航同步推出 Pallas-2 重型火箭，单发可送 25 吨算力载荷至 LEO。
articles.content_en: The inaugural Beijing Space Computing Summit released the Space AI Compute Network white paper: the first 5 compute satellites will reach orbit in 2027, with a 200-satellite constellation by 2030 delivering 1 EFLOPS of in-orbit compute for real-time remote sensing, low-latency cross-border comms and emergency AI inference. CAS Space introduced the Pallas-2 heavy launcher, capable of delivering 25 tons of compute payload to LEO per launch.

1 EFLOPS 太空算力目标
Pallas-2 火箭单发 25 吨
聚焦遥感与低延迟推理

articles.title_en: ASE Q2 Net Profit +58% YoY, CoWoS Still Faces 20-25% Shortfall
articles.summary: 日月光 ASE 公布 2026Q2 净利同比 +58%，CoWoS 产能利用率 100%、客户排单到 2027Q1，先进封装毛利率突破 45%。

Advanced packaging exceeded 55% of revenue for the first time at 45.2% gross margin, with CoWoS and SoIC bookings extending into Q1 2027. ASE raised 2026 capex from NT$110B to NT$145B, primarily for K25 Kaohsiung expansion.

articles.title_en: JCET Lands 7.8B Yuan Lingang Fab, Hits 3 Limit-Ups in 4 Days
articles.summary: 国家大基金二期与上海临港集团联手注资长电科技 78 亿元，建设 HBM 后段先进封装产线；公司股价 4 个交易日 3 次涨停，目标价上调至 110 元。
articles.summary_en: China's Big Fund II and Shanghai Lingang invest 7.8B yuan in JCET for an HBM back-end advanced packaging line. JCET shares hit 3 limit-ups in 4 trading days; target price raised to 110 yuan.
articles.source: 证券时报 / 长电科技公告
articles.content: 长电科技 6/27 晚公告，获得国家大基金二期 + 上海临港集团合计 78 亿元注资，用于在临港新建 HBM 后段先进封装基地，规划年产能 36 万片晶圆等效，2027Q3 量产。中金、申万均把目标价上调至 110 元；公司股价 6/24-6/27 间出现 3 次涨停。
articles.content_en: JCET disclosed on June 27 a combined 7.8B yuan investment from China's Big Fund II and Shanghai Lingang, funding a new HBM back-end advanced packaging fab in Lingang with planned annual capacity of 360k wafer equivalents, mass production in Q3 2027. CICC and Shenwan both raised the target price to 110 yuan; the stock hit 3 limit-ups between June 24 and June 27.
key_points: 大基金二期 + 临港注资 78 亿
HBM 后段封装产线
年产能 36 万片晶圆等效
目标价上调至 110 元
4 天 3 次涨停
key_points_en: 7.8B yuan from Big Fund II + Lingang
HBM back-end packaging line
360k wafer eq. annual capacity
Target price 110 yuan
3 limit-ups in 4 days

articles.title: 比亚迪发布璇玑 A3 智驾平台：单芯片 1024 TOPS、L4 城区上路
articles.title_en: BYD Unveils Xuanji A3 Driving Platform: 1,024 TOPS Single Chip, L4 Urban Deployment
articles.summary: 比亚迪发布璇玑 A3 自研智驾平台，单 SoC 1024 TOPS，年底上车汉 L、唐 L，2027 年支持城区 L4 自动驾驶。
articles.summary_en: BYD unveils the Xuanji A3 in-house driving platform with 1,024 TOPS per SoC, debuting in Han L and Tang L by year-end, with urban L4 support coming in 2027.
articles.source: 比亚迪汽车 / 第一财经
articles.content: 比亚迪 6/28 在惠州亚迪科技大会发布璇玑 A3 智驾平台：自研 NPU 单芯片算力 1024 TOPS，端到端模型推理时延 8ms。该平台 2026Q4 首发汉 L、唐 L，2027Q2 支持限定城区 L4 自动驾驶；公司同步开放璇玑 A3 SDK，引入鸿蒙智行、广汽、岚图三家合作。
articles.content_en: On June 28, BYD unveiled the Xuanji A3 driving platform at its Huizhou Yadi tech summit: an in-house NPU SoC delivering 1,024 TOPS with 8ms end-to-end inference latency. The platform launches in Han L and Tang L in Q4 2026, with limited urban L4 support in Q2 2027. BYD also opened the Xuanji A3 SDK to Harmony Intelligent Mobility, GAC and Voyah.
key_points: 单 SoC 1024 TOPS
端到端推理 8ms
汉 L / 唐 L 年底首发
2027Q2 城区 L4
开放 SDK 引入三方合作
key_points_en: 1,024 TOPS per SoC
8ms end-to-end inference
Han L / Tang L launch Q4 2026
Urban L4 in Q2 2027
Open SDK with 3 partners

articles.title: Momenta 通过港交所聆讯，预计 7 月 IPO 融资 12 亿美元
articles.title_en: Momenta Passes HKEX Hearing, July IPO Targeting $1.2B
articles.summary: Momenta 通过港交所聆讯，预计 7 月初挂牌融资 12 亿美元，将成为港股「自动驾驶第一股」。
articles.summary_en: Momenta passed the HKEX hearing and plans an early-July listing targeting $1.2B, set to become Hong Kong's first autonomous-driving listed company.
articles.source: 香港交易所 / 21 世纪经济报道
articles.content: Momenta 6/28 通过港交所聆讯，承销团由中金、瑞银、汇丰组成，募资规模约 12 亿美元，估值 80 亿美元。招股书显示 2025 年营收 32 亿元、毛利率 38%，已与上汽、奥迪、丰田三家车企签订定点协议。预计 7 月 8 日左右挂牌，将成为港股自动驾驶第一股。
articles.content_en: Momenta cleared the HKEX hearing on June 28. CICC, UBS and HSBC are leading the offering, targeting $1.2B at an $8B valuation. The prospectus shows 2025 revenue of 3.2B yuan and 38% gross margin, with awarded programs at SAIC, Audi and Toyota. Listing is expected around July 8, making Momenta Hong Kong's first listed autonomous-driving pure-play.
key_points: 募资 12 亿美元 估值 80 亿
中金/瑞银/汇丰承销
2025 营收 32 亿 毛利率 38%
SAIC/Audi/Toyota 定点
港股 7 月 8 日挂牌
key_points_en: $1.2B raise at $8B valuation
CICC/UBS/HSBC underwriters
2025 revenue 3.2B yuan, 38% GM
Awarded by SAIC/Audi/Toyota
Listing target July 8

articles.title: 国内首个 1000P 智算中心在合肥点亮：单集群 5 万张昇腾 910C
articles.title_en: China's First 1,000-PFLOPS Intelligent Compute Center Goes Live in Hefei
articles.summary: 合肥智算中心二期 6/28 点亮，单集群部署 5 万张昇腾 910C，FP16 算力突破 1000 PFLOPS，主要服务国家实验室与大模型训练。
articles.summary_en: Hefei Intelligent Compute Center Phase II went live on June 28 with 50k Ascend 910C accelerators, exceeding 1,000 PFLOPS at FP16, serving national labs and foundation model training.
articles.source: 合肥日报 / 国家超算合肥中心
articles.content: 合肥智算中心二期 6/28 正式投运，单集群部署 5 万张昇腾 910C 加速卡，FP16 算力达 1080 PFLOPS、FP8 突破 2160 PFLOPS。中心采用浸没式液冷 + 自研 RoCEv3 互联，PUE 1.08。一期已为科大讯飞星火 V6 训练提供 320 PFLOPS 算力，二期对国家实验室、长三角车企 AI 训练开放。
articles.content_en: Hefei Intelligent Compute Center Phase II went online June 28, deploying 50,000 Ascend 910C accelerators in a single cluster: 1,080 PFLOPS FP16 and 2,160 PFLOPS FP8. The facility uses immersion cooling with in-house RoCEv3 interconnect (PUE 1.08). Phase I already provided 320 PFLOPS for iFLYTEK Spark V6 training; Phase II opens to national labs and Yangtze River Delta automakers.
key_points: 单集群 5 万张昇腾 910C
FP16 1080 PFLOPS FP8 2160 PFLOPS
PUE 1.08 浸没式液冷
自研 RoCEv3 互联
服务讯飞 / 国家实验室 / 车企
key_points_en: 50k Ascend 910C single cluster
1080 PFLOPS FP16 / 2160 PFLOPS FP8
PUE 1.08 immersion cooled
In-house RoCEv3 interconnect
Serves iFLYTEK/labs/OEMs

articles.title: 中国电子行业 1-5 月利润同比 +103.9%，半导体设备贡献近半增量
articles.title_en: China Electronics Industry Profits +103.9% YoY in Jan-May, Semi Equipment Contributes Half
articles.summary: 工信部公布 1-5 月电子信息制造业利润总额同比 +103.9%，半导体设备、先进封装、HBM 贡献近一半增量。
articles.summary_en: MIIT reports electronics manufacturing profits up 103.9% YoY in Jan-May 2026, with semiconductor equipment, advanced packaging and HBM contributing nearly half the increment.
articles.source: 工信部 / 国家统计局
articles.content: 工信部 6/27 公布 2026 年 1-5 月电子信息制造业经济运行数据：规模以上企业营业收入 8.6 万亿元（同比 +18.2%），利润总额 4820 亿元（同比 +103.9%）。其中半导体设备贡献利润增量约 880 亿（+45%），先进封装 410 亿（+38%），HBM 与存储 360 亿（+32%）。出口结构出现 AI 服务器、HBM 模组、汽车电子三条新增长极。
articles.content_en: On June 27, MIIT released electronics manufacturing data for Jan-May 2026: revenue 8.6 trillion yuan (+18.2% YoY), profit 482B yuan (+103.9%). Semiconductor equipment added ~88B yuan in profit (+45%), advanced packaging 41B (+38%), HBM and memory 36B (+32%). Exports show three new growth engines: AI servers, HBM modules and automotive electronics.
key_points: 营收 8.6 万亿同比 +18.2%
半导体设备贡献 880 亿增量
先进封装贡献 410 亿增量
AI 服务器/HBM/汽车电子三新极
key_points_en: Revenue 8.6T yuan +18.2%
Profit 482B yuan +103.9%
Semi equipment +88B yuan
Adv packaging +41B yuan
3 new export engines

articles.title: Anthropic 内部预告 Claude 4.5 三模型矩阵：Opus/Sonnet/Haiku 月内更新
articles.title_en: Anthropic Previews Claude 4.5 Tri-Model Matrix: Opus/Sonnet/Haiku Updates Within Month
articles.summary: Anthropic 内部备忘录显示 Claude 4.5 系列将在 7 月初发布，Opus 主攻 AI Agent 长任务、Sonnet 提升代码与多模态、Haiku 进入边缘端。
articles.summary_en: An internal Anthropic memo indicates the Claude 4.5 family will launch in early July: Opus targeting long-horizon agents, Sonnet improving code and multimodal, Haiku moving to edge devices.
articles.source: The Information / Anthropic 备忘录
articles.content: 据 The Information 6/28 获取的 Anthropic 内部备忘录，Claude 4.5 系列将于 7 月 8-15 日陆续上线：Opus 4.5 对齐 GPT-5.5 in agentic 长任务，工具调用稳定性提升 30%；Sonnet 4.5 代码 SWE-Bench 突破 75%，原生 720p 视频理解；Haiku 4.5 通过蒸馏压到 3.4B 参数，可在 Snapdragon X2 与高通 AI100 端侧推理。
articles.content_en: Per a June 28 The Information memo, the Claude 4.5 series ships July 8-15: Opus 4.5 matches GPT-5.5 on agentic long-horizon tasks with +30% tool-use reliability; Sonnet 4.5 exceeds 75% on SWE-Bench and natively understands 720p video; Haiku 4.5 distills to 3.4B parameters running on Snapdragon X2 and Qualcomm AI100.
key_points: 7 月 8-15 日陆续上线
Opus 工具调用稳定性 +30%
Sonnet SWE-Bench >75% + 720p 视频
Haiku 蒸馏到 3.4B 端侧
覆盖 Agent/代码/边缘三条主线
key_points_en: Rolling launch July 8-15
Opus tool reliability +30%
Sonnet SWE-Bench >75% + 720p video
Haiku distilled to 3.4B edge
Agent/code/edge three-prong

hero.title: 国产 AI 算力闭环时刻：美团 1.6 万亿 LongCat-2.0 全栈国产芯片训练 + 寒武纪同日万亿市值
hero.title_en: The Domestic AI Compute Loop Closes: Meituan's 1.6T LongCat-2.0 Trained Fully on Chinese Chips, Cambricon Hits $1T Cap Same Day
hero.summary: 6 月 30 日，美团正式开源 1.6 万亿参数 MoE 大模型 LongCat-2.0——业界首个在 5 万张国产 AI 芯片集群上完成训练 + 推理全流程的万亿大模型，原生 1M 超长上下文，35 万亿 token 预训练；同一天，国产 AI ASIC 龙头寒武纪市值首破万亿元人民币，成为科创板首家万亿级算力芯片企业。模型自主与芯片自主的「双万亿」共振，标志着中国 AI 产业正式从「依赖海外 GPU」过渡期迈入自主可控的 AI 2.0 时代。
hero.summary_en: On June 30, Meituan open-sourced LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion-parameter MoE model — the first trillion-scale model in the industry to complete both training and inference on a fully domestic chip cluster of over 50,000 Chinese AI accelerators, natively supporting 1M context and pre-trained on 35 trillion tokens. On the same day, China's leading AI ASIC maker Cambricon became the first STAR Market company to cross the 1 trillion yuan market-cap line. The dual-trillion resonance of model autonomy and silicon autonomy marks China's official transition from GPU dependence into the self-controllable AI 2.0 era.
